name: Bulbasaur
introduction: 妙蛙种子，种子宝可梦。出生后有一段期间会从背上的种子得到营养并且长大。
introduction_tw: 妙蛙種子，種子寶可夢。出生後有一段期間會從背上的種子得到營養並且長大。
introduction_en: Bulbasaur, the Seed Pokémon. A young Bulbasaur uses the nutrients from its seed for the energy it needs to grow.
introduction_vn: Bulbasaur, the Seed Pokémon. A young Bulbasaur uses the nutrients from its seed for the energy it needs to grow.
introduction_kr: 이상해씨, 씨앗 포켓몬, 태어나서부터 얼마 동안은 등의 씨앗으로부터 영양을 공급받아 크게 성장한다.
introduction_pt: Bulbasaur, o Pokémon Semente. Um jovem Bulbasaur usa os nutrientes de sua semente para a energia que precisa para crescer.
introduction_th: บูลบาซอร์ โปเกมอนเมล็ดพันธุ์ บูลบาซอร์ตัวน้อยใช้สารอาหารจากเมล็ดพันธุ์เพื่อสร้างพลังงานเพื่อการเติบโต
location_pt: Poder de cura
location_th: พลังแห่งการรักษา

name: Ivysaur
introduction: 妙蛙草，种子宝可梦，是妙蛙种子的进化形，背上背着花苞，当花苞吸取养分之后，就会开出巨大的花朵。
introduction_tw: 妙蛙草，種子寶可夢，是妙蛙種子的進化形，背上背著花苞，當花苞吸取養分之後，就會開出巨大的花朵。
introduction_en: The Seed Pokémon, Ivysaur, Bulbasaur's evolved form. The bulb on its back absorbs nourishment and blooms into a large flower.
introduction_vn: The Seed Pokémon, Ivysaur, Bulbasaur's evolved form. The bulb on its back absorbs nourishment and blooms into a large flower.
introduction_kr: 이상해풀, 씨앗 포켓몬, 이상해씨의 진화형, 등에 있는 봉오리가 양분을 흡수한 후 커다란 꽃을 피운다.
introduction_pt: O Pokémon Semente, Ivysaur, a forma evoluída de Bulbasaur. O bulbo em suas costas absorve nutrição e floresce em uma grande flor.
introduction_th: โปเกมอนเมล็ดพันธุ์ อิวีซอร์ รูปแบบวิวัฒนาการของบูลบาซอร์ หัวที่หลังจะดูดซับสารอาหารและบานเป็นดอกไม้ขนาดใหญ่
location_pt: Poder de cura
location_th: พลังแห่งการรักษา

name: Venusaur
introduction: 妙蛙花，种子宝可梦，是妙蛙草的进化形，经常在有阳光的地方定住不动，有人猜测它是在进行光合作用。吸取阳光以便获取能量。
introduction_tw: 妙蛙花，種子寶可夢，是妙蛙草的進化形，經常在有陽光的地方定住不動，有人猜測它是在進行光合作用。吸取陽光以便獲取能量。
introduction_en: Venusaur, the Seed Pokémon and the evolved form of Ivysaur. When it is catching the sun's rays, it often remains quiet and still. Some say that its collects large amounts of sunlight, which it can turn into energy.
introduction_vn: Venusaur, the Seed Pokémon and the evolved form of Ivysaur. When it is catching the sun's rays, it often remains quiet and still. Some say that its collects large amounts of sunlight, which it can turn into energy.
introduction_kr: 이상해꽃, 씨앗 포켓몬, 이상해풀의 진화형, 자주 햇살이 있는 곳에서 움직이지 않으며, 사람들은 광합성을 하는 것이라고 생각한다. 빛을 흡수해 에너지를 얻을 수 있다.
introduction_pt: Venusaur, o Pokémon Semente e a forma evoluída de Ivysaur. Quando está captando os raios do sol, ele geralmente permanece quieto e parado. Alguns dizem que ele coleta grandes quantidades de luz solar, que pode transformar em energia.
introduction_th: วีนัสซอร์ โปเกมอนเมล็ดพันธุ์และร่างวิวัฒนาการของไอวี่ซอร์ เมื่อได้รับแสงอาทิตย์ มันมักจะนิ่งและเงียบ บางคนบอกว่ามันสะสมแสงอาทิตย์ไว้เป็นจำนวนมาก ซึ่งสามารถแปลงเป็นพลังงานได้
location_pt: Poder de cura
location_th: พลังแห่งการรักษา

name: Mega Venusaur
name_th: เมก้าวีนัสซอร์
introduction: 据说充足的营养和阳光会让花儿的颜色变得更加鲜艳，花香会治愈人心。
introduction_tw: 據說充足的營養和陽光會讓花兒的顏色變得更加鮮豔，花香會治癒人心。
introduction_en: Adequate nutrition and sunlight makes the colors of the flowers more vivid, fragrance of the flowers heals people's hearts.
introduction_vn: Adequate nutrition and sunlight makes the colors of the flowers more vivid, fragrance of the flowers heals people's hearts.
introduction_kr: 충분한 영양분과 태양의 빛은 꽃의 색을 선명하게 만든다고 하며, 꽃의 향기는 사람의 마음을 치유한다.
introduction_pt: Nutrição adequada e luz solar tornam as cores das flores mais vivas, a fragrância das flores cura o coração das pessoas.
introduction_th: สารอาหารและแสงแดดที่เพียงพอทำให้สีของดอกไม้สดใสขึ้น กลิ่นหอมของดอกไม้ช่วยเยียวยาจิตใจผู้คน
location_pt: Poder de cura e controle de veneno
location_th: พลังการรักษาและการควบคุมพิษ

name: Charmander
name_th: ชาร์แมนเดอร์
introduction: 小火龙，蜥蜴宝可梦。尾巴上的火焰是生命之火，充满活力的时候，火焰会猛烈燃烧，火焰消失就是死亡的时候。
introduction_tw: 小火龍，蜥蜴寶可夢。尾巴上的火焰是生命之火，充滿活力的時候，火焰會猛烈燃燒，火焰消失就是死亡的時候。
introduction_en: Charmander. A flame burns on the tip of its tail from birth. It is said that a Charmander dies if its flame ever goes out.
introduction_vn: Charmander. A flame burns on the tip of its tail from birth. It is said that a Charmander dies if its flame ever goes out.
introduction_kr: 파이리, 도마뱀 포켓몬, 꼬리의 불꽃은 생명의 상징이다. 활력이 충만할 때는 왕성하게 불타오르며, 화염이 꺼지는 것은 곧 생명이 다하는 때이다.
introduction_pt: Charmander. Uma chama queima na ponta de sua cauda desde o nascimento. Dizem que um Charmander morre se sua chama se apagar.
introduction_th: ชาร์แมนเดอร์ เปลวไฟจะลุกไหม้ที่ปลายหางตั้งแต่เกิด กล่าวกันว่าหากเปลวไฟดับลง ชาร์แมนเดอร์จะตาย
location_pt: Queimadura de chama
location_th: เปลวไฟเผาไหม้

name: Charmeleon
name_th: ชาร์เมเลียน
introduction: 火恐龙，火焰宝可梦，是小火龙的进化形，会用尾巴将敌人扫倒，然后用尖锐的爪子将敌人切裂。
introduction_tw: 火恐龍，火焰寶可夢，是小火龍的進化形，會用尾巴將敵人掃倒，然後用尖銳的爪子將敵人切裂。
introduction_en: Charmeleon, the Flame Pokémon and the evolved form of Charmander. Charmeleon knocks down opponents with its tail, then defeats them using razor-sharp claws?
introduction_vn: Charmeleon, the Flame Pokémon and the evolved form of Charmander. Charmeleon knocks down opponents with its tail, then defeats them using razor-sharp claws?
introduction_kr: 리자드, 화염 포켓몬, 파이리의 진화형, 꼬리를 휘둘러 상대를 쓰러트리고 날카로운 발톱으로 갈기갈기 찢어버린다.
introduction_pt: Charmeleon, o Pokémon Flamejante e a forma evoluída de Charmander. Charmeleon derruba oponentes com sua cauda, e então os derrota usando garras afiadas como navalhas?
introduction_th: Charmeleon โปเกมอนเปลวไฟและ Charmander ร่างวิวัฒนาการ Charmeleon ล้มคู่ต่อสู้ด้วยหาง จากนั้นจึงเอาชนะพวกเขาด้วยกรงเล็บที่คมกริบ
location_pt: Queimadura de chama
location_th: เปลวไฟเผาไหม้

name: Charizard
introduction: 喷火龙，火焰宝可梦。强力的喷射火焰，甚至可以把岩石熔化掉。
introduction_tw: 噴火龍，火焰寶可夢。強力的噴射火焰，甚至可以把岩石熔化掉。
introduction_en: Charizard, the Flame Pokémon. Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders.
introduction_vn: Charizard, the Flame Pokémon. Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders.
introduction_kr: 리자몽, 화염 포켓몬, 강력한 화염을 뿜어 암석도 태워버릴 수 있다.
introduction_pt: Charizard, o Pokémon Flamejante. Cospe fogo que é quente o suficiente para derreter pedras.
introduction_th: ชาริซาร์ด โปเกม่อนเปลวไฟ พ่นไฟที่ร้อนพอที่จะละลายก้อนหินได้
location_pt: Queimadura de chama
location_th: เปลวไฟเผาไหม้

name: Mega Charizard X
name_th: เมก้าชาร์ริซาร์ด X
introduction: 全身充斥着非比寻常的力量，这种力量染黑了它的身体，燃烧出炽热的蓝色火焰。
introduction_tw: 全身充斥著非比尋常的力量，這種力量染黑了它的身體，燃燒出熾熱的藍色火焰。
introduction_en: The overwhelming power that fills its entire body causes it to turn black and create intense blue flames.
introduction_vn: The overwhelming power that fills its entire body causes it to turn black and create intense blue flames.
introduction_kr: 온몸에 넘치는 엄청난 힘이 몸을 검게 물들였고, 푸른 불꽃을 태운다.
introduction_pt: poder avassalador que preenche todo o seu corpo faz com que ele fique preto e crie intensas chamas azuis.
introduction_th: พลังอันมหาศาลที่แผ่ซ่านไปทั่วร่างกายทำให้มันกลายเป็นสีดำและสร้างเปลวเพลิงสีฟ้าอันรุนแรง
location_pt: Queimadura de chama e respingo de chama
location_th: เปลวไฟลุกไหม้และเปลวไฟสาด

name: Mega Charizard Y
name_th: เมก้าชาริซาร์ด Y
introduction: 与训练家的牵绊是它的力量之源。它引以为傲的飞行能力完全凌驾于喷气式飞机之上。
introduction_tw: 與訓練家的牽絆是它的力量之源。它引以為傲的飛行能力完全淩駕於噴氣式飛機之上。
introduction_en: Its bond with its Trainer is the source of its power. It boasts speed and maneuverability greater than that of a jet fighter.
introduction_vn: Its bond with its Trainer is the source of its power. It boasts speed and maneuverability greater than that of a jet fighter.
introduction_kr: 트레이너와의 유대가 힘의 원천이다. 제트기를 능가하는 비행 능력을 자랑한다.
introduction_pt: Seu vínculo com seu Trainer é a fonte de seu poder. Ele ostenta velocidade e manobrabilidade maiores que as de um caça a jato.
introduction_th: ความผูกพันกับเครื่องฝึกเป็นที่มาของพลัง มันมีความเร็วและความคล่องตัวมากกว่าเครื่องบินขับไล่
location_pt: Queima de chama e aumento de queima
location_th: การเผาไหม้ด้วยเปลวไฟและการเพิ่มการเผาไหม้

name: Squirtle
name_th: สควิร์ทเทิล
introduction: 杰尼龟，那是擅长水属性攻击的小龟宝可梦。有坚硬的龟壳，能够发挥强烈的水枪攻击。详细的栖息地点不明。
introduction_tw: 傑尼龜，那是擅長水屬性攻擊的小龜寶可夢。有堅硬的龜殼，能夠發揮強烈的水槍攻擊。詳細的棲息地點不明。
introduction_en: Squirtle, the Tiny Turtle Pokémon that is good at launching water attacks. It has a tough shell that can squirt out water with vigorous force. The specific habitat is unknown.
introduction_vn: Squirtle, the Tiny Turtle Pokémon that is good at launching water attacks. It has a tough shell that can squirt out water with vigorous force. The specific habitat is unknown.
introduction_kr: 꼬부기, 물 타입 공격에 능숙한 꼬마거북 포켓몬, 단단한 등껍질을 지니고 있으며 강력한 물대포 공격을 가할 수 있다. 자세한 서식지는 불명이다.
introduction_pt: Squirtle, o Pokémon Tartaruga Minúsculo que é bom em lançar ataques de água. Ele tem uma carapaça resistente que pode esguichar água com força vigorosa. O habitat específico é desconhecido.
introduction_th: สควิร์ทเทิล โปเกมอนเต่าจิ๋วที่เก่งในการโจมตีด้วยน้ำ มันมีเปลือกที่แข็งแรงซึ่งสามารถพ่นน้ำออกมาด้วยพลังอันแรงกล้า แหล่งที่อยู่อาศัยที่แน่นอนนั้นยังไม่ทราบแน่ชัด
location_pt: Proteja os aliados
location_th: ปกป้องพันธมิตร

name: Wartortle
introduction: 卡咪龟，龟宝可梦。是杰尼龟的进化形。那长毛覆盖的尾巴，被人们认为是长寿的象征。
introduction_tw: 卡咪龜，龜寶可夢。是傑尼龜的進化形。那長毛覆蓋的尾巴，被人們認為是長壽的象徵。
introduction_en: Wartortle, the Turtle Pokémon and the evolved form of Squirtle. Its furry tail is very popular as a symbol of long life.
introduction_vn: Wartortle, the Turtle Pokémon and the evolved form of Squirtle. Its furry tail is very popular as a symbol of long life.
introduction_kr: 어니부기, 거북이 포켓몬, 꼬부기의 진화형, 털로 덮인 꼬리는 장수의 상징으로 여겨진다.
introduction_pt: Wartortle, o Pokémon Tartaruga e a forma evoluída de Squirtle. Sua cauda peluda é muito popular como um símbolo de vida longa.
introduction_th: Wartortle โปเกมอนเต่าและร่างวิวัฒนาการของ Squirtle หางที่มีขนของมันเป็นที่นิยมมากในฐานะสัญลักษณ์ของอายุยืนยาว
location_pt: Proteja os aliados
location_th: ปกป้องพันธมิตร

name: Blastoise
introduction: 水箭龟，龟甲宝可梦。是卡咪龟的进化形。巨大的身体虽然没有速度的优势，但是力量惊人。坚硬的甲壳防御力特高，背上的水炮攻击力威力巨大无比。
introduction_tw: 水箭龜，龜甲寶可夢。是卡咪龜的進化形。巨大的身體雖然沒有速度的優勢，但是力量驚人。堅硬的甲殼防禦力特高，背上的水炮攻擊力威力巨大無比。
introduction_en: Blastoise, the Shellfish Pokémon The evolved form of Wartortle Blastoise's strength lies in its power, rather than its speed Its shell is like armor and attacks from the hydro cannons on its back are virtually unstoppable.
introduction_vn: Blastoise, the Shellfish Pokémon The evolved form of Wartortle Blastoise's strength lies in its power, rather than its speed Its shell is like armor and attacks from the hydro cannons on its back are virtually unstoppable.
introduction_kr: 거북왕, 등껍질 포켓몬, 어니부기의 진화형, 거대한 몸체는 스피드의 우세는 없지만, 놀라운 힘을 지니고 있다. 단단한 등껍질은 방어력이 매우 높으며, 등의 물대포의 공격력도 매우 강력하다.
introduction_pt: Blastoise, o Pokémon Marisco A forma evoluída de Wartortle A força de Blastoise está em seu poder, e não em sua velocidade. Sua carapaça é como uma armadura e os ataques dos canhões hidráulicos em suas costas são praticamente imparáveis.
introduction_th: บลาสต์ โปเกมอนหอย ร่างที่พัฒนาแล้วของ Wartortle Blastoise มีความแข็งแกร่งอยู่ที่พลัง มากกว่าความเร็ว เปลือกของมันเปรียบเสมือนเกราะ และการโจมตีจากปืนใหญ่ไฮโดรที่ด้านหลังนั้นแทบจะหยุดยั้งไม่ได้
location_pt: Proteja os aliados
location_th: ปกป้องพันธมิตร

name: Mega Blastoise
name_th: เมก้า บลาสตัวส์
introduction: 龟甲上的大炮拥有不逊于坦克的威力，结实的腰腿使它能在发射的冲击力之下用力站稳。
introduction_tw: 龜甲上的大炮擁有不遜於坦克的威力，結實的腰腿使它能在發射的衝擊力之下用力站穩。
introduction_en: Giant cannon on its tortoise shell has the power more than a tank, strong waist and legs makes it stable under the impact of the launching.
introduction_vn: Giant cannon on its tortoise shell has the power more than a tank, strong waist and legs makes it stable under the impact of the launching.
introduction_kr: 등껍질의 대포는 전차 수준의 위력을 지녔으며, 튼튼한 허리와 다리로 발사의 충격을 견뎌낸다.
introduction_pt: Canhão gigante em seu casco de tartaruga tem mais poder do que um tanque, cintura e pernas fortes o tornam estável sob o impacto do lançamento.
introduction_th: ปืนใหญ่ขนาดยักษ์บนกระดองเต่านั้นมีพลังมากกว่ารถถัง เอวและขาที่แข็งแรงช่วยให้มีเสถียรภาพภายใต้แรงกระแทกของการยิง
location_pt: Escudo de Água e Escudo DEF
location_th: โล่น้ำ & โล่ป้องกัน

name: Caterpie
name_th: คาเตอร์ปี้
introduction: 绿毛虫，青虫宝可梦。使用脚上的吸盘攀爬树木来啃食他们喜欢吃的树叶。
introduction_tw: 綠毛蟲，青蟲寶可夢。使用腳上的吸盤攀爬樹木來啃食他們喜歡吃的樹葉。
introduction_en: Caterpie, the Worm Pokémon. Caterpie uses the suction cups on its feet to climb trees and feed on its favorite leaves.
introduction_vn: Caterpie, the Worm Pokémon. Caterpie uses the suction cups on its feet to climb trees and feed on its favorite leaves.
introduction_kr: 캐터피, 애벌레 포켓몬, 발끝의 빨판을 사용해 나무를 오르고, 좋아하는 나뭇잎을 먹는다.
introduction_pt: Caterpie, o Pokémon Verme. Caterpie usa as ventosas em seus pés para subir em árvores e se alimentar de suas folhas favoritas.
introduction_th: แคเทอร์ปี้ โปเกมอนหนอน แคเทอร์ปี้ใช้ถ้วยดูดที่เท้าเพื่อปีนต้นไม้และกินใบไม้ที่มันโปรดปราน
location_pt: Grande redução na velocidade
location_th: ลดความเร็วได้อย่างมาก

name: Butterfree
name_th: บัตเตอร์ฟรี
introduction: 巴大蝶，蝶属性宝可梦，铁甲蛹的进化形。可以藉着翅膀上的鳞粉在水面上弹跳。
introduction_tw: 巴大蝶，蝶屬性寶可夢，鐵甲蛹的進化形。可以藉著翅膀上的鱗粉在水面上彈跳。
introduction_en: Butterfree, the Butterfly Pokémon. Butterfree is the evolved form of Metapod. The scales covering its wings help it to shed water.
introduction_vn: Butterfree, the Butterfly Pokémon. Butterfree is the evolved form of Metapod. The scales covering its wings help it to shed water.
introduction_kr: 버터플, 나비 포켓몬, 단데기의 진화형, 날개의 인분이 물을 튕겨낸다.
introduction_pt: Butterfree, o Pokémon Borboleta. Butterfree é a forma evoluída de Metapod. As escamas que cobrem suas asas o ajudam a eliminar água.
introduction_th: บัตเตอร์ฟรี โปเกมอนผีเสื้อ บัตเตอร์ฟรีคือโปเกมอนที่วิวัฒนาการมาจากเมตาพอด เกล็ดที่ปกคลุมปีกช่วยให้มันขับน้ำออก
location_pt: Grande redução na velocidade
location_th: ลดความเร็วได้อย่างมาก

name: Beedrill
introduction: 毒蜂宝可梦，大针锋，是铁壳昆进化过来的，屁股那根毒针非常的危险。
introduction_tw: 毒蜂寶可夢，大針鋒，是鐵殼昆進化過來的，屁股那根毒針非常的危險。
introduction_en: Beedrill, the Poison Bee Pokémon, is an evolved form of Kakuna. Its sting is highly poisonous.
introduction_vn: Beedrill, the Poison Bee Pokémon, is an evolved form of Kakuna. Its sting is highly poisonous.
introduction_kr: 독침붕, 독벌 포켓몬, 딱충이의 진화 형태로, 엉덩이의 독침은 매우 위험하다.
introduction_pt: Beedrill, o Pokémon Abelha Venenosa, é uma forma evoluída de Kakuna. Sua picada é altamente venenosa.
introduction_th: Beedrill โปเกมอนผึ้งพิษ เป็นโปเกมอนที่พัฒนามาจาก Kakuna เหล็กไนของมันมีพิษร้ายแรง
location_vn: Sát Thương Thường: giảm trị liệu đơn thể
location_pt: Dano normal: redução de cura de alvo único
location_th: ความเสียหายปกติ: ลดการรักษาเป้าหมายเดี่ยว

name: Mega Beedrill
name_th: เมก้าบีดริลล์
introduction: 双脚也变化为毒针。用手脚的针猛刺之后，以尾部的毒针给出最后一击。
introduction_tw: 雙腳也變化為毒針。用手腳的針猛刺之後，以尾部的毒針給出最後一擊。
introduction_en: Its legs have become poison stingers. It stabs its prey repeatedly with the stingers on its limbs, dealing the final blow with the stinger on its rear.
introduction_vn: Its legs have become poison stingers. It stabs its prey repeatedly with the stingers on its limbs, dealing the final blow with the stinger on its rear.
introduction_kr: 두 다리도 독침으로 변해 있다. 손발의 독침으로 맹렬하게 공격한 후, 꼬리의 독침으로 최후의 일격을 가한다.
introduction_pt: Suas pernas se tornaram ferrões venenosos. Ele esfaqueia sua presa repetidamente com os ferrões em seus membros, dando o golpe final com o ferrão em sua parte traseira.
introduction_th: ขาของมันกลายเป็นเหล็กไนที่มีพิษ มันแทงเหยื่อซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่าด้วยเหล็กไนที่ขาของมัน และโจมตีเหยื่อด้วยเหล็กไนที่ด้านหลัง
location_pt: Aumento de veneno e redução de cura única
location_th: เพิ่มพิษและลดการรักษาเพียงครั้งเดียว

name: Pidgey
introduction: 波波，空中的宝可梦。是飞行的宝可梦中个性最温和，最容易捕捉的。是宝可梦训练家初学者小试身手的最好目标。
introduction_tw: 波波，空中的寶可夢。是飛行的寶可夢中個性最溫和，最容易捕捉的。是寶可夢訓練家初學者小試身手的最好目標。
introduction_en: Pidgey is a Flying Pokémon. Among all the Flying Pokémon, it is the gentlest and easiest to capture. A perfect target for the beginning Pokémon Trainer to test his Pokémon's skills.
introduction_vn: Pidgey is a Flying Pokémon. Among all the Flying Pokémon, it is the gentlest and easiest to capture. A perfect target for the beginning Pokémon Trainer to test his Pokémon's skills.
introduction_kr: 구구, 아기새 포켓몬, 비행 포켓몬 중 성격이 가장 온순해서 포획이 쉽다. 초보자 포켓몬 트레이너들이 솜씨를 시험해 보기 좋은 상대다.
introduction_pt: Pidgey é um Pokémon Voador. Entre todos os Pokémon Voadores, é o mais gentil e fácil de capturar. Um alvo perfeito para o Treinador Pokémon iniciante testar as habilidades de seus Pokémon.
introduction_th: Pidgey เป็นโปเกมอนบิน ในบรรดาโปเกมอนบินทั้งหมด Pidgey เป็นโปเกมอนที่อ่อนโยนที่สุดและจับได้ง่ายที่สุด เหมาะอย่างยิ่งสำหรับเทรนเนอร์โปเกมอนมือใหม่ที่ต้องการทดสอบทักษะของโปเกมอน

name: Pidgeotto
introduction: 比比鸟，波波进化后的形态。会急速俯冲以锐利的爪子当武器捕捉小动物当食物，波波的温柔个性在进化后剧烈转变，性好攻击请多小心。
introduction_tw: 比比鳥，波波進化後的形態。會急速俯衝以銳利的爪子當武器捕捉小動物當食物，波波的溫柔個性在進化後劇烈轉變，性好攻擊請多小心。
introduction_en: Pidgeotto, an evolved form of the Pidgey. It is armed with sharp claws and dives from the sky to capture its prey. Unlike the more gentle Pidgey, Pidgeotto can be dangerous. Approach with extreme caution.
introduction_vn: Pidgeotto, an evolved form of the Pidgey. It is armed with sharp claws and dives from the sky to capture its prey. Unlike the more gentle Pidgey, Pidgeotto can be dangerous. Approach with extreme caution.
introduction_kr: 피죤, 구구의 진화 형태, 신속한 돌진과 날카로운 발톱을 무기로 작은 동물들을 먹이로 삼는다. 구구의 온순했던 성격과는 판이하게 다른 공격성을 지니고 있어 주의해야 한다.
introduction_pt: Pidgeotto, uma forma evoluída do Pidgey. Ele é armado com garras afiadas e mergulha do céu para capturar sua presa. Ao contrário do mais gentil Pidgey, o Pidgeotto pode ser perigoso. Aproxime-se com extremo cuidado.
introduction_th: Pidgeotto เป็นร่างที่พัฒนามาจาก Pidgey มันมีกรงเล็บที่แหลมคมและพุ่งลงมาจากท้องฟ้าเพื่อจับเหยื่อ Pidgey นั้นเป็นสัตว์ที่อ่อนโยนกว่า Pidgeotto อาจเป็นอันตรายได้ ดังนั้นควรเข้าใกล้ด้วยความระมัดระวังอย่างยิ่ง

name: Rattata

introduction_tw: 森林中的寶可夢小拉達，喜歡吃樹果等堅硬的東西跟乾酪，有的時候它會看上粗心大意的旅行者的食物，跑到野地來。

introduction_vn: A Forest Pokémon, Rattata. It likes cheese, nuts, fruits, and berries. It also comes out into open fields to steal food from careless travelers.

introduction_en: Raticate, the Mouse Pokémon. A Dark and Normal type. When they band together, they steal food from people's homes.
introduction_vn: Raticate, the Mouse Pokémon. A Dark and Normal type. When they band together, they steal food from people's homes.

introduction_pt: Raticate, o Pokémon Rato. Um tipo Dark e Normal. Quando se unem, roubam comida das casas das pessoas.

introduction_tw: 烈雀，跟波波不同，脾氣火爆，有的時候會攻擊人類跟其他的寶可夢。
introduction_en: Unlike Pidgey, Spearow has a terrible attitude. It is very wild and will sometimes attack other Pokémon and humans.
introduction_vn: Unlike Pidgey, Spearow has a terrible attitude. It is very wild and will sometimes attack other Pokémon and humans.

introduction_pt: Diferentemente de Pidgey, Spearow tem uma atitude terrível. Ele é muito selvagem e às vezes ataca outros Pokémon e humanos.
introduction_th: ต่างจาก Pidgey, Spearow มีทัศนคติที่แย่มาก มันเป็นสัตว์ป่าที่ดุร้ายและบางครั้งมันจะโจมตีโปเกมอนตัวอื่นและมนุษย์

introduction_tw: 大嘴雀，是鳥嘴寶可夢。烈雀的進化的型。擁有巨大翅膀，可以一整天持續飛行。它的鳥嘴力量強大。

introduction_vn: Fearow, the Beak Pokémon. The evolved form of Spearow. Its large, powerful wings allow it to fly for an entire day. The crushing power of its beak is tremendous.

introduction_pt: Fearow, o Pokémon Bico. A forma evoluída de Spearow. Suas asas grandes e poderosas permitem que ele voe por um dia inteiro. O poder esmagador de seu bico é tremendo.

introduction_tw: 身體會隨著年齡增長不斷變長。每到夜裡，它會一圈圈地將身體纏繞在樹枝上休息。

introduction_tw: 腹部的花紋看起來像一張可怕的臉。弱小的敵人只要看到這個花紋就會被嚇跑。

introduction_vn: Pichu, the Tiny Mouse Pokémon.  The electric sacs on Pichu's cheeks are small. If it tries to store more electricity than they can hold, Pichu will shock itself.

introduction_tw: 寶寶丁，氣球寶可夢。身體充滿彈性。一跳起來，可以飛到很遠的地方去。

name: Jigglypuff

introduction_tw: 胖丁，氣球寶可夢。以一雙又圓又大的眼睛誘對手靠近，唱出讓人神清氣爽的歌。
introduction_en: Jigglypuff, the Balloon Pokémon. When Jigglypuff's big eyes begin to quiver, everyone becomes sleepy as it sings a lullaby.
introduction_vn: Jigglypuff, the Balloon Pokémon. When Jigglypuff's big eyes begin to quiver, everyone becomes sleepy as it sings a lullaby.

name: Wigglytuff

introduction_tw: 當２只胖可丁依偎在一起時，它們便會因對方的毛皮太過舒適而難以分開。
introduction_en: Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won't want to be separated.
introduction_vn: Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won't want to be separated.

introduction_th: ขนของพวกมันรู้สึกดีจนถ้าพวกมันสองตัวนอนแนบชิดกัน พวกมันจะไม่อยากแยกจากกัน

name: Zubat

introduction_tw: 超音蝠，是蝙蝠寶可夢。利用發出的超音波飛行。躲在陰暗洞窟平時很少出來。

introduction_vn: Zubat, the Bat Pokémon. Emits ultrasonic cries while it flies. It hides in dark caves and rarely leaves these dark spots.

introduction_th: ซูแบต โปเกมอนค้างคาว ปล่อยคลื่นเสียงอัลตราโซนิกขณะบิน มันซ่อนตัวอยู่ในถ้ำมืดและไม่ค่อยออกจากจุดมืดเหล่านี้
location_pt: Auxiliar, Prolongar Veneno
location_th: ช่วยยืดอายุพิษ

name: Golbat

introduction_tw: 大嘴蝠，有尖銳的牙齒。咬住對手以後會吸取300cc血液的寶可夢。

introduction_vn: Golbat. Attacking with its sharp fangs, this Pokémon can drain three hundred cubic centimeters of blood per bite.
introduction_kr: 골뱃, 날카로운 이빨이 있으며, 상대를 물면 300cc의 피를 빨아먹을 수 있다.

introduction_th: โกลแบต โปเกมอนตัวนี้มีเขี้ยวที่แหลมคมและสามารถดูดเลือดได้มากถึง 300 ลูกบาศก์เซนติเมตรต่อการกัดหนึ่งครั้ง

introduction_en: Crobat, the Bat Pokémon and the evolved form of Golbat. With its two additional wings, it is able to fly much faster.
introduction_vn: Crobat, the Bat Pokémon and the evolved form of Golbat. With its two additional wings, it is able to fly much faster.

location_pt: Auxiliar, Prolongar Veneno
location_th: ช่วยยืดอายุพิษ

name: Oddish

introduction_tw: 要是以為它是普通的草而將它拔起，就會聽到它的叫聲。這讓人感到莫名的恐怖。

introduction_vn: It may be mistaken for a clump of weeds. If you try to yank it out of the ground, it shrieks horribly.

location_th: ความเสียหายประเภทพิษ

name: Gloom

introduction_tw: 臭臭花，雜草寶可夢。會散發強烈的臭味。對付水屬性的寶可夢很厲害，不過害怕火屬性和飛行屬性的寶可夢。

introduction_vn: Gloom, the Weed Pokémon. Gloom gives off a very unpleasant smell. While strong against Water-type Pokémon, Gloom is weak against Fire and Flying types.

introduction_th: Gloom โปเกมอนประเภทวัชพืช Gloom ส่งกลิ่นที่ไม่พึงประสงค์ออกมา แม้จะแข็งแกร่งต่อโปเกมอนประเภทน้ำ แต่ Gloom กลับอ่อนแอต่อโปเกมอนประเภทไฟและบิน

name: Meowth
introduction_tw: 喵喵，妖怪貓寶可夢。到了夜晚眼睛就會發亮，會把硬幣之類的物品搜集回來珍藏，但是白天的時候就只會一直睡懶覺。
introduction_en: Meowth, the Scratch Cat Pokémon. Sleeps in the daytime. At night, its eyes glow as it happily collects coins, its favorite things.
introduction_vn: Meowth, the Scratch Cat Pokémon. Sleeps in the daytime. At night, its eyes glow as it happily collects coins, its favorite things.
introduction_kr: 냐옹, 요괴고양이 포켓몬, 밤이 되면 눈에서 빛이 나며, 동전 같은 것들을 모아서 수집한다. 하지만 낮에는 잠만 잔다.
introduction_pt: Meowth, o Pokémon Gato Arranhador. Dorme durante o dia. À noite, seus olhos brilham enquanto ele alegremente coleta moedas, suas coisas favoritas.
introduction_th: เหมียวท์ โปเกม่อนแมวขี้เล่น นอนหลับในเวลากลางวัน ในเวลากลางคืน ดวงตาของมันจะเรืองแสงในขณะที่มันสะสมเหรียญซึ่งเป็นของโปรดของมันอย่างมีความสุข
location_pt: Meow
location_th: Meow

name: Persian
introduction_tw: 貓老大，暹邏貓寶可夢，喵喵進化形。由於肌肉很柔軟，所以能不發出腳步聲行走，可以瞬間捕獲獵物。
introduction_en: Persian, the Classy Cat Pokémon and the evolved form of Meowth. Persian can walk silently thanks to its nimble muscles. It pounces on its prey at lightning speed.
introduction_vn: Persian, the Classy Cat Pokémon and the evolved form of Meowth. Persian can walk silently thanks to its nimble muscles. It pounces on its prey at lightning speed.
introduction_kr: 페르시온, 샴고양이 포켓몬, 냐옹의 진화형이다. 부드러운 근육 덕분에 발소리를 내지 않고 걸을 수 있다. 순식간에 사냥감을 포획한다.
introduction_pt: Persian, o Pokémon Gato Elegante e a forma evoluída de Meowth. Persian pode andar silenciosamente graças aos seus músculos ágeis. Ele ataca sua presa na velocidade da luz.
introduction_th: เปอร์เซีย โปเกมอนแมวสุดเท่ และร่างวิวัฒนาการของเหมียวท์ เปอร์เซียสามารถเดินอย่างเงียบเชียบได้ด้วยกล้ามเนื้อที่คล่องแคล่ว โจมตีเหยื่อด้วยความเร็วแสง
location_pt: Savage damage
location_th: Savage damage

name: Psyduck
introduction: 可达鸭，鸭宝可梦，头痛变得剧烈时就能使出不可思议的力量，不过当时的记忆却不会留下来，由于怎样也想不起来因此总歪着脖子。
introduction_tw: 可達鴨，鴨寶可夢，頭痛變得劇烈時就能使出不可思議的力量，不過當時的記憶卻不會留下來，由於怎樣也想不起來因此總歪著脖子。
introduction_en: Psyduck, the Duck Pokémon. Psyduck suffers frequent headaches and can exhibit mysterious attacks when they become especially intense.
introduction_vn: Psyduck, the Duck Pokémon. Psyduck suffers frequent headaches and can exhibit mysterious attacks when they become especially intense.
introduction_kr: 고라파덕, 오리 포켓몬, 두통이 심해지면 신비한 힘을 사용한다. 하지만 그때의 기억은 남지 않으며. 도저히 생각이 나질 않아서 계속 고개를 갸우뚱거리고 있다.
introduction_pt: Psyduck, o Pokémon Pato. Psyduck sofre de dores de cabeça frequentes e pode exibir ataques misteriosos quando eles se tornam especialmente intensos.
introduction_th: Psyduck โปเกม่อนเป็ด Psyduck มักปวดหัวบ่อยและอาจแสดงท่าโจมตีลึกลับเมื่อปวดหัวอย่างรุนแรงเป็นพิเศษ

name: Golduck
introduction: 哥达鸭，鸭子宝可梦，可达鸭的进化形。两手两脚上的蹼，都能够以动力方式游泳，前进速度是宝可梦中最快的。
introduction_tw: 哥達鴨，鴨子寶可夢，可達鴨的進化形。兩手兩腳上的蹼，都能夠以動力方式游泳，前進速度是寶可夢中最快的。
introduction_en: Golduck, the Duck Pokémon. The evolved form of Psyduck. Golduck is very adept at using its webbed hands and feet, making it the fastest swimming Pokémon of all.
introduction_vn: Golduck, the Duck Pokémon. The evolved form of Psyduck. Golduck is very adept at using its webbed hands and feet, making it the fastest swimming Pokémon of all.
introduction_kr: 골덕, 오리 포켓몬, 고라파덕의 진화형이다. 두 손발의 물갈퀴로 자유롭게 헤엄치며, 그 스피드는 포켓몬 중에서 제일이다.

introduction_en: Bellsprout's thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, it leaks a fluid that melts even iron. It is also quick at capturing prey with its vines.
introduction_vn: Bellsprout's thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, it leaks a fluid that melts even iron. It is also quick at capturing prey with its vines.
introduction_kr: 모다피의 가늘고 부드러운 쉽게 휘어지며, 아무리 강한 공격이라도 피할 수 있다. 입에서는 철조차 녹일 수 있는 액체를 뿜어내며, 덩굴채찍으로 사냥감을 붙잡을 수 있다.
introduction_pt: corpo fino e flexível do Bellsprout permite que ele se curve e balance para evitar qualquer ataque, por mais forte que seja. De sua boca, ele vaza um fluido que derrete até ferro. Ele também é rápido em capturar presas com suas vinhas.
introduction_th: ร่างกายที่ผอมบางและยืดหยุ่นของเบลล์สราวท์ทำให้มันงอตัวและแกว่งไปมาเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงการโจมตีใดๆ แม้ว่ามันจะแข็งแกร่งเพียงใดก็ตาม มันปล่อยของเหลวออกมาจากปากซึ่งสามารถหลอมเหล็กได้ นอกจากนี้มันยังจับเหยื่อได้อย่างรวดเร็วด้วยเถาวัลย์ของมัน
location_pt: Debuff de dano
location_th: ดีบัฟความเสียหาย

name: Weepinbell
name_th: วีพินเบลล์
introduction: 口呆花，捕蝇小精灵，和植物一模一样的小精灵。会用毒粉沾满大意走近的猎物，然后把他们捉住。
introduction_tw: 口呆花，捕蠅小精靈，和植物一模一樣的小精靈。會用毒粉沾滿大意走近的獵物，然後把他們捉住。
introduction_en: Weepinbell, the Flycatcher Pokémon. Weepinbell looks like a plant and covers opponents with a poisonous powder in order to catch them.
introduction_vn: Weepinbell, the Flycatcher Pokémon. Weepinbell looks like a plant and covers opponents with a poisonous powder in order to catch them.
introduction_kr: 우츠동, 파리잡이 포켓몬, 식물과 똑같이 생긴 포켓몬이다. 방심한 사냥감에게 독가루를 뿌려 붙잡는다.
introduction_pt: Weepinbell, o Pokémon Flycatcher. Weepinbell parece uma planta e cobre os oponentes com um pó venenoso para pegá-los.
introduction_th: วีพินเบลล์ โปเกม่อนจับแมลง วีพินเบลล์มีลักษณะเหมือนพืชและโรยผงพิษไว้ทั่วตัวศัตรูเพื่อจับพวกมัน
location_pt: Debuff de dano
location_th: ดีบัฟความเสียหาย

name: Victreebel
introduction: 用花蜜的香味引诱猎物。据说进到嘴里的东西会在1天内连骨头都被溶解掉。
introduction_tw: 用花蜜的香味引誘獵物。據說進到嘴裡的東西會在1天內連骨頭都被溶解掉。
introduction_en: Lures prey with the sweet aroma of honey. Swallowed whole, the prey is dissolved in a day, bones and all.
introduction_vn: Lures prey with the sweet aroma of honey. Swallowed whole, the prey is dissolved in a day, bones and all.
introduction_kr: 꿀냄새로 먹잇감을 유혹한다. 입안에 들어온 것은 하루 만에 뼈까지 녹여버린다고 한다.
introduction_pt: Atrai a presa com o doce aroma do mel. Engolida inteira, a presa é dissolvida em um dia, ossos e tudo.
introduction_th: ล่อเหยื่อด้วยกลิ่นหอมหวานของน้ำผึ้ง กลืนเหยื่อทั้งตัว เหยื่อจะละลายหมดภายในหนึ่งวัน ทั้งกระดูกและกระดูก
location_pt: Debuff de dano
location_th: ดีบัฟความเสียหาย

name: Geodude
introduction: 小拳石，岩石宝可梦。防御力非常高，对于物理攻击有超群的耐久性。
introduction_tw: 小拳石，岩石寶可夢。防禦力非常高，對於物理攻擊有超群的耐久性。
introduction_en: Geodude, the Rock Pokémon. Geodude has incredibly high defensive power, making it virtually resistant to any physical attacks.
introduction_vn: Geodude, the Rock Pokémon. Geodude has incredibly high defensive power, making it virtually resistant to any physical attacks.
introduction_kr: 꼬마돌, 암석 포켓몬, 방어력이 매우 높으며, 물리공격에 엄청난 내성을 발휘한다.
introduction_pt: Geodude, o Pokémon de Pedra. Geodude tem um poder defensivo incrivelmente alto, o que o torna virtualmente resistente a qualquer ataque físico.
introduction_th: Geodude โปเกมอนหิน Geodude มีพลังป้องกันสูงอย่างน่าเหลือเชื่อ ทำให้ทนทานต่อการโจมตีทางกายภาพทุกประเภท
location_pt: Escudo de provocação
location_th: โล่เยาะเย้ย

name: Graveler
introduction: 隆隆石经常快速的从山路上滚下来，碾碎路上的任何东西。尽管长了脚，它可以回复到跟小拳石相同的形态给予自己飘浮的能力，但会少掉两只脚。
introduction_tw: 隆隆石經常快速的從山路上滾下來，碾碎路上的任何東西。儘管長了腳，它可以回復到跟小拳石相同的形態給予自己飄浮的能力，但會少掉兩隻腳。
introduction_en: Often seen rolling down mountain trails. Obstacles are just things to roll straight over, not avoid. Despite having legs, it can revert to a legless form similar to Geodude. This grants it the ability to float.
introduction_vn: Often seen rolling down mountain trails. Obstacles are just things to roll straight over, not avoid. Despite having legs, it can revert to a legless form similar to Geodude. This grants it the ability to float.
introduction_kr: 데구리는 산길에서 빠르게 굴러 내려오며, 길에 있는 어떤 물건이든 부딪혀 부숴버린다. 다리가 자라긴 했지만, 꼬마돌과 동일한 형태로 부유할 수 있다. 대신 다리가 다시 없어진다.
introduction_pt: Frequentemente visto rolando por trilhas de montanha. Obstáculos são apenas coisas para rolar direto, não evitar. Apesar de ter pernas, ele pode reverter para uma forma sem pernas semelhante ao Geodude. Isso lhe concede a habilidade de flutuar.
introduction_th: มักพบเห็นกลิ้งไปตามเส้นทางบนภูเขา สิ่งกีดขวางเป็นเพียงสิ่งที่กลิ้งข้ามไปตรงๆ ไม่ใช่หลีกเลี่ยง แม้ว่าจะมีขา แต่ก็สามารถกลับคืนสู่ร่างที่ไม่มีขาได้คล้ายกับ Geodude ซึ่งทำให้มันสามารถลอยน้ำได้
location_pt: Escudo de provocação
location_th: โล่เยาะเย้ย

name: Golem
introduction: 隆隆岩，重量级宝可梦。被硬得像岩石的坚硬外壳包围着，一年一度蜕皮一次，体积会变大。
introduction_tw: 隆隆岩，重量級寶可夢。被硬得像岩石的堅硬外殼包圍著，一年一度蛻皮一次，體積會變大。
introduction_en: Golem, a Megaton Pokémon. Once a year it sheds its bedrock shell and grows larger.
introduction_vn: Golem, a Megaton Pokémon. Once a year it sheds its bedrock shell and grows larger.
introduction_kr: 딱구리, 메가톤 포켓몬, 암반처럼 단단한 껍데기로 뒤덮여 있으며, 1년에 한 번 허물을 벗어 몸집이 커진다.
introduction_pt: Golem, um Pokémon Megaton. Uma vez por ano, ele troca sua concha de rocha-mãe e cresce mais.
introduction_th: โกเลม โปเกมอนเมกาตัน มันจะลอกเปลือกชั้นหินและเติบโตขึ้นทุกปี
location_pt: Escudo de provocação
location_th: โล่เยาะเย้ย

name: Slowking
introduction: 呆呆王，王者宝可梦，拥有惊人的智慧和灵感，任何时刻都不慌不忙悠闲自在
introduction_tw: 呆呆王，王者寶可夢，擁有驚人的智慧和靈感，任何時刻都不慌不忙悠閒自在
introduction_en: Slowking, the king of Pokémon, possesses amazing wisdom and inspiration, and is always calm and relaxed.
introduction_vn: Slowking, the king of Pokémon, possesses amazing wisdom and inspiration, and is always calm and relaxed.
introduction_kr: 포켓몬의 왕인 슬로킹은 놀라운 지혜와 영감을 가지고 있으며, 항상 차분하고 느긋합니다.
introduction_pt: Slowking, o rei dos Pokémon, possui uma sabedoria e inspiração incríveis, e está sempre calmo e relaxado.
introduction_th: Slowking ราชาแห่งโปเกมอน เป็นผู้ที่มีความรอบรู้และแรงบันดาลใจที่น่าทึ่ง และเป็นคนที่สงบและผ่อนคลายอยู่เสมอ
location_pt: dull
location_th: dull

name: Magnemite
introduction: 小磁怪，磁铁宝可梦。会吸附在电线上以电力为食，如果停电了就调查一下电闸吧；可能是因为上面吸附着密密麻麻的小磁怪。
introduction_tw: 小磁怪，磁鐵寶可夢。會吸附在電線上以電力為食，如果停電了就調查一下電閘吧；可能是因為上面吸附著密密麻麻的小磁怪。
introduction_en: Magnemite, a Magnet Pokémon. It attaches itself to power lines to feed on electricity. If your house has a power outage, check your circuit breakers. You may find a large number of this Pokémon clinging to the breaker box.
introduction_vn: Magnemite, a Magnet Pokémon. It attaches itself to power lines to feed on electricity. If your house has a power outage, check your circuit breakers. You may find a large number of this Pokémon clinging to the breaker box.
introduction_kr: 코일, 자석 포켓몬, 전선에 붙어 전기를 먹는다. 정전이 되었다면 누전차단기를 살펴보자. 코일이 빽빽하게 붙어 있을지도 모른다.
introduction_pt: Magnemite, um Pokémon Magnet. Ele se prende a linhas de energia para se alimentar de eletricidade. Se sua casa tiver uma queda de energia, verifique seus disjuntores. Você pode encontrar um grande número desses Pokémon agarrados à caixa do disjuntor.
introduction_th: Magnemite เป็นโปเกมอนแม่เหล็ก มันจะเกาะติดกับสายไฟเพื่อดูดพลังงานไฟฟ้า หากไฟดับในบ้านของคุณ ให้ตรวจสอบเบรกเกอร์ คุณอาจพบโปเกมอนชนิดนี้จำนวนมากเกาะติดอยู่กับกล่องเบรกเกอร์
location_pt: Bomba de autodestruição
location_th: ระเบิดทำลายตนเอง

name: Magneton
introduction: 三合一磁怪，磁铁宝可梦。是小磁怪的进化形。浮在空中，会发出强力的磁力线和高压电。
introduction_tw: 三合一磁怪，磁鐵寶可夢。是小磁怪的進化形。浮在空中，會發出強力的磁力線和高壓電。
introduction_en: Magneton, a Magnet Pokémon. The evolved form of Magnemite. Its anti-gravitational powers allow it to float, and it can emit powerful magnetic and electric fields.
introduction_vn: Magneton, a Magnet Pokémon. The evolved form of Magnemite. Its anti-gravitational powers allow it to float, and it can emit powerful magnetic and electric fields.
introduction_kr: 레어코일, 자석 포켓몬, 코일의 진화형이다. 공중에 떠 다니며, 강력한 자기장과 고전압을 내뿜는다.
introduction_pt: Magneton, um Pokémon Magnet. A forma evoluída de Magnemite. Seus poderes antigravitacionais permitem que ele flutue, e ele pode emitir poderosos campos magnéticos e elétricos.
introduction_th: Magneton โปเกมอนธาตุแม่เหล็ก รูปแบบวิวัฒนาการของ Magnemite พลังต่อต้านแรงโน้มถ่วงทำให้มันลอยตัวได้ และมันสามารถปล่อยสนามแม่เหล็กและไฟฟ้าอันทรงพลังออกมาได้
location_pt: Bomba de autodestruição
location_th: ระเบิดทำลายตนเอง

name: Magnezone

introduction_tw: 自爆磁怪，磁鐵寶可夢。由受到特殊磁場影響的三合一磁怪進化而來。從３個組件中放出磁力。
introduction_en: Magnezone, a Magnet Pokémon. It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.
introduction_vn: Magnezone, a Magnet Pokémon. It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.
introduction_kr: 자포코일, 자기장 포켓몬, 특수한 자기장의 영향으로 레어코일이 진화했다. 3개의 유닛에서 자력을 방출한다.
introduction_pt: Magnezone, um Pokémon Magnet. Ele evoluiu da exposição a um campo magnético especial. Três unidades geram magnetismo.
introduction_th: แม็กเนโซน โปเกมอนแม่เหล็ก วิวัฒนาการมาจากการสัมผัสกับสนามแม่เหล็กพิเศษ หน่วยทั้งสามสร้างแม่เหล็กได้
location_pt: Bomba de autodestruição
location_th: ระเบิดทำลายตนเอง

introduction_tw: 大蔥鴨，鴨鴨寶可夢，因為和特定的植物一起吃的話，味道極為鮮美，因此數量變得極少，是珍貴的寶可夢。
introduction_en: Farfetch'd, a Wild Duck Pokémon. Farfetch'd makes a delicious meal, especially when cooked with leek. Because of this, Farfetch'd is nearly extinct.
introduction_vn: Farfetch'd, a Wild Duck Pokémon. Farfetch'd makes a delicious meal, especially when cooked with leek. Because of this, Farfetch'd is nearly extinct.
introduction_kr: 파오리, 청둥오리 포켓몬, 특정 식물과 함께 먹으면 매우 맛이 있기 때문에, 개체수가 무척 줄어든 희귀한 포켓몬이다.
introduction_pt: Farfetch'd, um Pokémon Pato Selvagem. Farfetch'd é uma refeição deliciosa, especialmente quando cozida com alho-poró. Por causa disso, Farfetch'd está quase extinto.
introduction_th: Farfetch'd โปเกมอนเป็ดป่า Farfetch'd เป็นอาหารที่มีรสชาติอร่อย โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งเมื่อปรุงกับต้นหอม ด้วยเหตุนี้ Farfetch'd จึงเกือบจะสูญพันธุ์

introduction_th: สร้างขึ้นโดยการดัดแปลงพันธุกรรม อย่างไรก็ตาม แม้ว่ามนุษย์จะมีพลังทางวิทยาศาสตร์ในการสร้างร่างกายของโปเกมอนตัวนี้ แต่พวกเขาก็ไม่สามารถมอบหัวใจแห่งความเมตตาให้แก่มันได้
location_en: Live for the battle & Overpowering psychic abilities
location_vn: Sinh Ra Để Chiến & Siêu Năng Áp Chế
location_pt: Viva para a batalha e habilidades psíquicas avassaladoras
location_th: มีชีวิตอยู่เพื่อการต่อสู้และความสามารถทางจิตที่เหนือกว่า

name: Mega Mewtwo X
name_th: เมก้ามิวทูX
introduction: 身体上的肌肉因精神力量而增强。它的握力为１吨。只要２秒就可以跑完100米！
introduction_tw: 身體上的肌肉因精神力量而增強。它的握力為１噸。只要２秒就可以跑完100公尺！
introduction_en: The muscles of the body are strengthened by the power of the mind. Its grip strength is 1 ton. It can run 100 meters in just 2 seconds!
introduction_vn: The muscles of the body are strengthened by the power of the mind. Its grip strength is 1 ton. It can run 100 meters in just 2 seconds!
introduction_kr: 몸의 근육은 마음의 힘으로 강화됩니다. 그 그립력은 1톤입니다. 2초 만에 100m를 달릴 수 있습니다!
introduction_pt: Os músculos do corpo são fortalecidos pelo poder da mente. Sua força de preensão é de 1 tonelada. Ele pode correr 100 metros em apenas 2 segundos!
introduction_th: กล้ามเนื้อของร่างกายได้รับการเสริมสร้างด้วยพลังแห่งจิตใจ แรงยึดเกาะสูงถึง 1 ตัน สามารถวิ่งได้ 100 เมตร ในเวลาเพียง 2 วินาที!
location_pt: Shura Fist e Percepção da Aura Assassina
location_th: หมัดชูร่าและการรับรู้ออร่าการสังหาร

name: Mega Mewtwo Y
name_th: เมก้ามิวทูY
introduction: 虽然身体变小了，力量却大到无法计算。只要稍稍使用念力，哪怕是高楼大厦也会化为灰烬。
introduction_tw: 雖然身體變小了，力量卻大到無法計算。只要稍微使用念力，就算高樓大廈也會化為灰燼。
introduction_en: Although his body has become smaller, his strength is so great that it cannot be calculated. With just a little use of telekinesis, even a tall building will be reduced to ashes.
introduction_vn: Although his body has become smaller, his strength is so great that it cannot be calculated. With just a little use of telekinesis, even a tall building will be reduced to ashes.
introduction_kr: 몸은 작아졌지만 힘은 셀 수 없을 만큼 크다. 염력을 조금만 써도 높은 빌딩도 재로 변한다.
introduction_pt: Embora seu corpo tenha se tornado menor, sua força é tão grande que não pode ser calculada. Com apenas um pouco de uso de telecinese, até mesmo um prédio alto será reduzido a cinzas.
introduction_th: แม้ว่าร่างกายของเขาจะเล็กลง แต่พลังของเขานั้นมหาศาลจนไม่สามารถคำนวณได้ ด้วยการใช้พลังจิตเคลื่อนย้ายวัตถุเพียงเล็กน้อย แม้แต่ตึกสูงก็อาจกลายเป็นเถ้าถ่านได้
location_pt: Controle Duplo de Corpo e Mente
location_th: การควบคุมร่างกายและจิตใจแบบคู่

name: Mew
introduction: 幻之宝可梦，据说有着所有宝可梦的遗传基因，只有遇到拥有纯洁的心灵和想要与强者相见的情感的人才会现身。
introduction_tw: 幻之寶可夢，據說有著所有寶可夢的遺傳基因，只有遇到擁有純潔的心靈和想要與強者相見的情感的人才會現身。
introduction_en: Psychic-type Pokémon that is said to possess the genetic composition of all Pokémon. Apparently, it appears only to those people who are pure of heart and have a strong desire to see it.
introduction_vn: Psychic-type Pokémon that is said to possess the genetic composition of all Pokémon. Apparently, it appears only to those people who are pure of heart and have a strong desire to see it.
introduction_kr: 환상의 포켓몬, 모든 포켓몬의 유전자를 지니고 있다고 한다. 순수한 마음을 지닌 자가 만나고 싶다는 강한 생각을 품으면 모습을 드러내는 것 같다.
introduction_pt: Pokémon do tipo psíquico que dizem possuir a composição genética de todos os Pokémon. Aparentemente, ele aparece apenas para aquelas pessoas que são puras de coração e têm um forte desejo de vê-lo.
introduction_th: โปเกมอนประเภทพลังจิตที่กล่าวกันว่ามีองค์ประกอบทางพันธุกรรมเหมือนกับโปเกมอนทุกตัว ดูเหมือนว่าจะปรากฏตัวเฉพาะกับผู้ที่มีจิตใจบริสุทธิ์และมีความปรารถนาอย่างแรงกล้าที่จะเห็นมันเท่านั้น
location_pt: Condição de status de área de efeito do negócio
location_th: สถานะข้อตกลง AOE

name: Chikorita
introduction: 虽然会挥舞叶子威吓对手，但由于叶子上会飘散出甜甜的香气，所以双方都会变得心平气和下来哦。
introduction_tw: 雖然會揮舞葉子威嚇對手，但由於葉子上會飄散出甜甜的香氣，所以雙方都會變得心平氣和下來哦。
introduction_en: It waves its leaf around to keep foes at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, creating a friendly atmosphere that becalms the battlers.
introduction_vn: It waves its leaf around to keep foes at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, creating a friendly atmosphere that becalms the battlers.
introduction_kr: 잎사귀를 휘둘러 상대를 위협하지만, 잎사귀에서 달콤한 향기가 풍겨 나와 서로 온화한 분위기가 된다.
introduction_pt: Ele balança sua folha para manter os inimigos afastados. No entanto, uma fragrância doce também emana da folha, criando uma atmosfera amigável que acalma os combatentes.
introduction_th: มันโบกใบไม้ไปมาเพื่อป้องกันศัตรู แต่กลิ่นหอมหวานยังลอยออกมาจากใบไม้ สร้างบรรยากาศเป็นมิตรที่ทำให้เหล่าผู้ต่อสู้สงบลง
location_pt: Cura em área
location_th: การรักษาแบบ AOE

name: Bayleaf
introduction: 月桂叶，叶宝可梦，菊草叶的进化形。飞叶快刀的绝招很强。有时候脖子周围会散发出香料的味道。
introduction_tw: 月桂葉，葉寶可夢，菊草葉的進化形。飛葉快刀的絕招很強。有時候脖子周圍會散發出香料的味道。
introduction_en: Bayleef, the Leaf Pokémon., and the evolved form of Chikorita. It sometimes emits a spicy aroma from the leaves around its neck and its Razor Leaf is extremely powerful.
introduction_vn: Bayleef, the Leaf Pokémon., and the evolved form of Chikorita. It sometimes emits a spicy aroma from the leaves around its neck and its Razor Leaf is extremely powerful.
introduction_kr: 베이리프, 잎사귀 포켓몬, 치코리타의 진화형이다. 잎날가르기 기술이 매우 강하다. 가끔씩 목 주변에서 향긋한 향기를 발산한다.
introduction_pt: Bayleef, o Pokémon Folha, e a forma evoluída de Chikorita. Às vezes, ele emite um aroma picante das folhas ao redor do pescoço e sua Razor Leaf é extremamente poderosa.
introduction_th: เบย์ลีฟ โปเกมอนใบไม้ และชิโคริต้าในรูปแบบวิวัฒนาการ บางครั้งมันจะปล่อยกลิ่นเผ็ดร้อนออกมาจากใบไม้รอบคอ และใบมีดโกนของมันก็ทรงพลังอย่างยิ่ง
location_pt: Cura em área
location_th: การรักษาแบบ AOE

name: Meganium
introduction: 大竺葵，香草宝可梦，是菊草叶的最终进化形。大竺葵吐出的气息，具有让枯萎的草复苏的力量。
introduction_tw: 大竺葵，香草寶可夢，是菊草葉的最終進化形。大竺葵吐出的氣息，具有讓枯萎的草復蘇的力量。
introduction_en: Meganium, the Herb Pokémon. Meganium is Chikorita's final evolved form. It has the ability to fully restore dried-up plants and bring them back to life with its breath.
introduction_vn: Meganium, the Herb Pokémon. Meganium is Chikorita's final evolved form. It has the ability to fully restore dried-up plants and bring them back to life with its breath.
introduction_kr: 메가니움, 허브 포켓몬, 치코리타의 최종 진화형이다. 메가니움이 뿜어내는 숨결에는 말라 죽은 풀과 나무를 살려내는 힘이 담겨 있다.
introduction_pt: Meganium, o Pokémon Herb. Meganium é a forma evoluída final de Chikorita. Ele tem a habilidade de restaurar completamente plantas secas e trazê-las de volta à vida com seu sopro.
introduction_th: เมกาเนียม โปเกมอนสมุนไพร เมกาเนียมคือร่างพัฒนาขั้นสุดท้ายของชิโคริต้า มันมีพลังในการฟื้นฟูพืชที่แห้งเหี่ยวให้กลับมามีชีวิตอีกครั้งด้วยลมหายใจของมัน
location_pt: Cura em área
location_th: การรักษาแบบ AOE

name: Cyndaquil
introduction: 火球鼠，火焰宝可梦。个性温和，兴奋的时候会从背上发出火焰。
introduction_tw: 火球鼠，火焰寶可夢。個性溫和，興奮的時候會從背上發出火焰。
introduction_en: Cyndaquil, the Flame Pokémon. Normally mild and even-tempered, it will shoot flame out of its back when excited.
introduction_vn: Cyndaquil, the Flame Pokémon. Normally mild and even-tempered, it will shoot flame out of its back when excited.
introduction_kr: 브케인, 불쥐 포켓몬, 성격이 온순하며, 흥분하면 등에서 화염을 뿜어낸다.
introduction_pt: Cyndaquil, o Pokémon Flamejante. Normalmente dócil e de temperamento equilibrado, ele dispara chamas de suas costas quando excitado.
introduction_th: ซินดาควิล โปเกมอนเปลวไฟ โดยปกติแล้วเป็นโปเกมอนที่อ่อนโยนและอารมณ์ดี เมื่อรู้สึกตื่นเต้น มันจะพ่นเปลวไฟออกมาจากหลัง
location_pt: Danos com base na aparência
location_th: ความเสียหายตามลักษณะที่ปรากฏ

name: Quilava
introduction: 火岩鼠，火山宝可梦，火球鼠的进化形。使用背上火炎的攻击，威力超群。
introduction_tw: 火岩鼠，火山寶可夢，火球鼠的進化形。使用背上火炎的攻擊，威力超群。
introduction_en: Quilava, the Volcano Pokémon, and the evolved form of Cyndaquil. It is capable of incredible attacks using the flame on its back.
introduction_vn: Quilava, the Volcano Pokémon, and the evolved form of Cyndaquil. It is capable of incredible attacks using the flame on its back.
introduction_kr: 마그케인, 화산 포켓몬, 브케인의 진화형, 등의 불꽃으로 공격해 적을 위협한다.
introduction_pt: Quilava, o Pokémon Volcano, e a forma evoluída de Cyndaquil. Ele é capaz de ataques incríveis usando a chama em suas costas.
introduction_th: ควิลาวา โปเกมอนภูเขาไฟ และซินดาควิลในรูปแบบวิวัฒนาการ มันสามารถโจมตีได้อย่างน่าเหลือเชื่อด้วยเปลวไฟที่ด้านหลัง
location_pt: Danos com base na aparência
location_th: ความเสียหายตามลักษณะที่ปรากฏ

name: Typhlosion
name_th: ไทฟโลเซียน
introduction: 会用灼热的火焰在周围制造出热浪隐藏身影。燃起的爆炸气浪能烧尽一切。
introduction_tw: 會用灼熱的火焰在周圍製造出熱浪隱藏身影。燃起的爆炸氣浪能燒盡一切。
introduction_en: It obscures itself behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intensely hot flames. This Pokémon creates blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.
introduction_vn: It obscures itself behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intensely hot flames. This Pokémon creates blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.
introduction_kr: 작열하는 불꽃으로 주변에 아지랑이를 만들어내서 모습을 숨길 수 있다. 불타오르며 폭발하는 바람은 모든 것을 태운다.
introduction_pt: Ele se esconde atrás de uma névoa de calor cintilante que ele cria usando suas chamas intensamente quentes. Este Pokémon cria explosões flamejantes que queimam tudo até virar cinzas.
introduction_th: มันบดบังตัวเองไว้ภายใต้หมอกความร้อนระยิบระยับที่สร้างขึ้นโดยใช้เปลวเพลิงอันร้อนแรง โปเกมอนตัวนี้สร้างระเบิดเพลิงที่เผาไหม้ทุกสิ่งให้กลายเป็นเถ้าถ่าน
location_pt: Danos com base na aparência
location_th: ความเสียหายตามลักษณะที่ปรากฏ

name: Totodile
introduction: 小锯鳄，大嘴宝可梦。拥有肌肉发达的下颚，什么东西都可以咬碎。对于眼前移动的任何东西，都会产生反射反应，忍不住上前咬住。
introduction_tw: 小鋸鱷，大嘴寶可夢。擁有肌肉發達的下顎，什麼東西都可以咬碎。對於眼前移動的任何東西，都會產生反射反應，忍不住上前咬住。
introduction_en: Totodile, the Big Jaw Pokémon. Its highly developed jaw is so powerful, it can crush practically anything. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.
introduction_vn: Totodile, the Big Jaw Pokémon. Its highly developed jaw is so powerful, it can crush practically anything. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.
introduction_kr: 리아코, 큰턱 포켓몬, 근육이 발달한 턱은 뭐든지 깨물어 부순다. 눈앞에서 움직이는 것이 있으면 참지 못하고 반사적으로 물어버린다.
introduction_pt: Totodile, o Pokémon Big Jaw. Sua mandíbula altamente desenvolvida é tão poderosa que pode esmagar praticamente qualquer coisa. Ele não hesitará em dar uma mordida em qualquer coisa que se mova.
introduction_th: โทโทไดล์ โปเกมอนขากรรไกรใหญ่ ขากรรไกรที่พัฒนาอย่างแข็งแกร่งของมันนั้นทรงพลังมาก มันสามารถบดขยี้ได้แทบทุกอย่าง และมันจะไม่ลังเลที่จะกัดทุกสิ่งที่เคลื่อนไหว
location_pt: Danos selvagens
location_th: ความเสียหายที่โหดร้าย

name: Croconaw
introduction: 蓝鳄，大颚宝可梦。小锯鳄的进化形，张开大嘴攻击，牙齿即使掉下也能马上长出来。
introduction_tw: 藍鱷，大顎寶可夢。小鋸鱷的進化形，張開大嘴攻擊，牙齒即使掉下也能馬上長出來。
introduction_en: Croconaw, a Big Jaw Pokémon, and the evolved form of Totodile. It opens its mouth wide and attacks, and if it loses its teeth, they regrow quickly.
introduction_vn: Croconaw, a Big Jaw Pokémon, and the evolved form of Totodile. It opens its mouth wide and attacks, and if it loses its teeth, they regrow quickly.
introduction_kr: 엘리게이, 큰턱 포켓몬, 리아코의 진화형, 큰 입을 벌려서 공격한다. 물었을 때 빠진 이빨은 계속해서 돋아난다.
introduction_pt: Croconaw, um Pokémon Big Jaw, e a forma evoluída de Totodile. Ele abre bem a boca e ataca, e se perder os dentes, eles crescem rapidamente.
introduction_th: โครโคนาว โปเกมอนขากรรไกรใหญ่ และร่างวิวัฒนาการของโทโทไดล์ มันอ้าปากกว้างและโจมตี และถ้ามันสูญเสียฟัน ฟันก็จะงอกขึ้นมาใหม่อย่างรวดเร็ว
location_pt: Danos selvagens
location_th: ความเสียหายที่โหดร้าย

name: Feraligatr
name_th: เฟราลิกาเตอร์
introduction: 大力鳄，大下巴宝可梦，是小锯鳄的最终形态。巨大而有力的下巴，一旦咬住的话，在对手倒下以前，是绝对不会松口的。
introduction_tw: 大力鱷，大下巴寶可夢，是小鋸鱷的最終形態。巨大而有力的下巴，一旦咬住的話，在對手倒下以前，是絕對不會鬆口的。
introduction_en: Feraligatr, the Big Jaw Pokémon. The final evolution of Totodile. Once a Feraligatr has clamped its powerful jaws around an opponent, it won't let go until the opponent is defeated.
introduction_vn: Feraligatr, the Big Jaw Pokémon. The final evolution of Totodile. Once a Feraligatr has clamped its powerful jaws around an opponent, it won't let go until the opponent is defeated.
introduction_kr: 장크로다일, 큰턱 포켓몬, 리아코의 최종 진화형이다. 크고 힘센 턱으로 한번 물면 상대가 쓰러지기 전까지 놓지 않는다.
introduction_pt: Feraligatr, o Pokémon Big Jaw. A evolução final do Totodile. Uma vez que um Feraligatr tenha fechado suas mandíbulas poderosas em torno de um oponente, ele não o soltará até que o oponente seja derrotado.
introduction_th: เฟอราลิกาเตอร์ โปเกมอนขากรรไกรใหญ่ วิวัฒนาการครั้งสุดท้ายของโทโทไดล์ เมื่อเฟอราลิกาเตอร์กัดฟันคู่ต่อสู้จนหมดแรงแล้ว มันจะไม่ยอมปล่อยจนกว่าจะเอาชนะคู่ต่อสู้ได้
location_pt: Danos selvagens
location_th: ความเสียหายที่โหดร้าย

name: Togepi
introduction: 波克比，针球宝可梦。据说对他温柔的话，就会发出令人心境祥和的光芒。
introduction_tw: 波克比，針球寶可夢。據說對他溫柔的話，就會發出令人心境祥和的光芒。
introduction_en: Togepi, the Spike Ball Pokémon Togepi is said to exude a relaxing aura that grows stronger when treated nicely.
introduction_vn: Togepi, the Spike Ball Pokémon Togepi is said to exude a relaxing aura that grows stronger when treated nicely.
introduction_kr: 토게피, 바늘알포켓몬. 그에게 부드럽게 대하면 마음이 따뜻한 빛을 발한다고 한다.
introduction_pt: Togepi, o Pokémon Bola de Espinhos Dizem que Togepi exala uma aura relaxante que fica mais forte quando bem tratada.
introduction_th: Togepi โปเกมอนลูกบอลสไปก์ โทเกปิ เชื่อว่าโทเกปิมีออร่าแห่งความผ่อนคลาย ซึ่งจะแข็งแกร่งขึ้นเมื่อได้รับการดูแลอย่างดี
location_pt: Assistência de sorte
location_th: โชคช่วย

name: Togetic
introduction: 据说是会带来幸运的宝可梦。如果发现心灵纯洁的人或宝可梦，就会现身并将幸福分给他们。
introduction_tw: 據說是會帶來幸運的寶可夢。如果發現心靈純潔的人或寶可夢，就會現身並將幸福分給他們。
introduction_en: Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
introduction_vn: Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
introduction_kr: 행운을 가져다준다는 포켓몬이라 불린다. 순수한 마음을 지닌 자를 발견하면 모습을 드러내서 행복을 나누어 준다.
introduction_pt: Dizem que Togetic é um Pokémon que traz boa sorte. Quando o Pokémon vê alguém que é puro de coração, diz-se que ele aparece e compartilha sua felicidade com essa pessoa.
introduction_th: เชื่อกันว่าโทเกติคเป็นโปเกมอนที่นำโชคมาให้ เมื่อโปเกมอนตัวนี้พบใครสักคนที่มีหัวใจบริสุทธิ์ โปเกมอนตัวนั้นจะปรากฏตัวและแบ่งปันความสุขให้กับคนนั้น
location_pt: Assistência de sorte
location_th: โชคช่วย

name: Togekiss
introduction: 波克基斯通常对宝可梦很友好、很关心。它们往往会回避冲突，据说它们从不出现在发生冲突的地方。它们被称作会分享祝福与关心的宝可梦。
introduction_tw: 波克基斯通常對寶可夢很友好、很關心。它們往往會回避衝突，據說它們從不出現在發生衝突的地方。它們被稱作會分享祝福與關心的寶可夢。
introduction_en: Togekiss is usually very friendly and caring about Pokémon. They always avoid conflict and will never be seen in a quarrel. It is said that they are Pokémons who share their blessings and care.
introduction_vn: Togekiss is usually very friendly and caring about Pokémon. They always avoid conflict and will never be seen in a quarrel. It is said that they are Pokémons who share their blessings and care.
introduction_kr: 토게키스는 포켓몬에게 우호적이고 관심이 많다. 분쟁을 회피하는 경우가 많고 다툼이 일어나는 장소에는 절대 나타나지 않는 다고 한다.  축복과 관심을 나누는 포켓몬이라 불린다.
introduction_pt: Togekiss geralmente é muito amigável e atencioso com Pokémon. Eles sempre evitam conflitos e nunca serão vistos em uma briga. Dizem que eles são Pokémons que compartilham suas bênçãos e cuidados.
introduction_th: โทเกคิสเป็นโปเกมอนที่เป็นมิตรและเอาใจใส่คนอื่นมาก พวกมันมักจะหลีกเลี่ยงความขัดแย้งและไม่เคยทะเลาะกันเลย ว่ากันว่าพวกมันเป็นโปเกมอนที่แบ่งปันพรและความห่วงใยซึ่งกันและกัน
location_pt: Assistência de sorte
location_th: โชคช่วย

name: Mareep
introduction: 咩利羊，绵羊宝可梦。身上软绵绵的羊毛可以储存静电，性格温驯，不喜欢战斗。
introduction_tw: 咩利羊，綿羊寶可夢。身上軟綿綿的羊毛可以儲存靜電，性格溫馴，不喜歡戰鬥。
introduction_en: Mareep, the Wool Pokémon. It stores static electricity in their wooly coats. They avoid battles and have mild dispositions.
introduction_vn: Mareep, the Wool Pokémon. It stores static electricity in their wooly coats. They avoid battles and have mild dispositions.
introduction_kr: 메리프, 솜털 포켓몬, 몸의 부드러운 털은 정전기를 모을 수 있다. 성격이 온순하며 싸움을 좋아하지 않는다.
introduction_pt: Mareep, o Pokémon de lã. Ele armazena eletricidade estática em seus casacos de lã. Eles evitam batalhas e têm disposições brandas.
introduction_th: มารีป โปเกมอนขนปุย มันเก็บไฟฟ้าสถิตไว้ในขนปุย พวกมันหลีกเลี่ยงการต่อสู้และมีนิสัยอ่อนโยน
location_pt: Suporte de polimento do tipo elétrico
location_th: รองรับบัฟประเภทไฟฟ้า

name: Flaaffy
introduction: 茸茸羊，绵毛宝可梦，软绵绵的体毛会储存电气，不过他拥有像橡皮一样的皮肤所以不会电到自己。
introduction_tw: 茸茸羊，綿毛寶可夢，軟綿綿的體毛會儲存電氣，不過他擁有像橡皮一樣的皮膚所以不會電到自己。
introduction_en: Flaaffy, the Wool Pokémon. Flaaffy builds up electricity in its thick coat of fur, but is unaffected by it, thanks to its rubber-like skin.
introduction_vn: Flaaffy, the Wool Pokémon. Flaaffy builds up electricity in its thick coat of fur, but is unaffected by it, thanks to its rubber-like skin.
introduction_kr: 보송송, 솜털 포켓몬, 푹신푹신한 털은 전기를 모으기 쉽지만 고무 같은 피부 덕분에 자신은 마비되지 않는다.
introduction_pt: Flaaffy, o Pokémon Lã. Flaaffy acumula eletricidade em sua espessa camada de pelo, mas não é afetado por ela, graças à sua pele parecida com borracha.
introduction_th: แฟลฟฟี่ โปเกมอนขนฟู แฟลฟฟี่สร้างกระแสไฟฟ้าในขนหนาๆ ของมัน แต่ไม่ได้รับผลกระทบจากกระแสไฟฟ้า เนื่องจากมีผิวหนังคล้ายยาง
location_pt: Suporte de polimento do tipo elétrico
location_th: รองรับบัฟประเภทไฟฟ้า

name: Ampharos
introduction: 电龙，光电宝可梦。尾巴尖端会发光，光芒可以传到很远的地方，成为指引迷路者的路标。被人们当成照明灯，很受器重。
introduction_tw: 電龍，光電寶可夢。尾巴尖端會發光，光芒可以傳到很遠的地方，成為指引迷路者的路標。被人們當成照明燈，很受器重。
introduction_en: Ampharos, the Light Pokémon.  It emits a strong light from the tip of its tail, which can be seen over long distances and has been treasured since ancient times as a beacon.
introduction_vn: Ampharos, the Light Pokémon.  It emits a strong light from the tip of its tail, which can be seen over long distances and has been treasured since ancient times as a beacon.
introduction_kr: 전룡, 라이트 포켓몬, 꼬리 끝이 빛나며 반짝인다. 빛이 아득히 먼 곳까지 닿아서 길 잃은 자들의 이정표가 된다. 봉화 역할로서 매우 중요하게 여겨지고 있다.
introduction_pt: Ampharos, o Pokémon de Luz.Ele emite uma luz forte da ponta da cauda, que pode ser vista a longas distâncias e tem sido valorizada desde os tempos antigos como um farol.
introduction_th: แอมฟาโรส โปเกม่อนแห่งแสงสว่างมันเปล่งแสงอันแรงกล้าจากปลายหางซึ่งสามารถมองเห็นได้ในระยะไกลและได้รับการยกย่องให้เป็นสัญญาณไฟมาตั้งแต่สมัยโบราณ
location_pt: Suporte de polimento do tipo elétrico
location_th: รองรับบัฟประเภทไฟฟ้า

name: Mega Ampharos
name_th: เมก้าแอมฟารอส
introduction: 超级电龙中再度出现毛发，且有飘逸感，超级电龙的尾巴也出现了很多红色球体 。
introduction_tw: 超級電龍中再度出現毛髮，且有飄逸感，超級電龍的尾巴也出現了很多紅色球體 。
introduction_en: The flowy wool Mega Ampharos had lost grows in again, and many red orbs appear on its tail.
introduction_vn: The flowy wool Mega Ampharos had lost grows in again, and many red orbs appear on its tail.
introduction_kr: 메가전룡으로 진화하면서 털이 다시 자랐고, 꼬리에는 붉은 구체가 나타났다.
introduction_pt: A lã esvoaçante que Mega Ampharos havia perdido cresce novamente, e muitas esferas vermelhas aparecem em sua cauda.
introduction_th: ขนแกะที่พลิ้วไหวซึ่งแอมฟารอสเมก้าสูญเสียไปก็งอกขึ้นมาใหม่ และมีลูกกลมสีแดงมากมายปรากฏขึ้นที่หางของมัน
location_pt: Suporte de polimento do tipo elétrico
location_th: รองรับบัฟประเภทไฟฟ้า

name: Azurill
introduction: 由充沛的营养所累积的尾巴，像橡皮球一样会反弹。在晴天的时候会聚集在水边玩水。
introduction_tw: 由充沛的營養所累積的尾巴，像橡皮球一樣會反彈。在晴天的時候會聚集在水邊玩水。
introduction_en: Its tail, which is packed with nutrition, is very bouncy like a rubber ball. On sunny days they gather at the edge of water and splash about for fun.
introduction_vn: Its tail, which is packed with nutrition, is very bouncy like a rubber ball. On sunny days they gather at the edge of water and splash about for fun.
introduction_kr: 영양이 듬뿍 담겨있는 꼬리는 고무공 같이 잘 뜬다. 맑은 날에는 물가에 모여서 물놀이를 한다.
introduction_pt: Sua cauda, que é cheia de nutrientes, é muito saltitante como uma bola de borracha. Em dias ensolarados, eles se reúnem na beira da água e chapinham por diversão.
introduction_th: หางของมันซึ่งเต็มไปด้วยสารอาหารจะมีความยืดหยุ่นมากเหมือนลูกบอลยาง ในวันที่อากาศแจ่มใส พวกมันจะรวมตัวกันที่ขอบน้ำและเล่นน้ำกันอย่างสนุกสนาน
location_pt: Bravo Matador de Dragões
location_th: นักล่ามังกรผู้กล้าหาญ

name: Marill
introduction: 玛力露，水老鼠宝可梦。有对大耳朵，再远的声音都可以听得到。尾巴就像用橡胶作成的，可以伸缩自如。在水里也可以游泳。
introduction_tw: 瑪力露，水老鼠寶可夢。有對大耳朵，再遠的聲音都可以聽得到。尾巴就像用橡膠作成的，可以伸縮自如。在水裡也可以游泳。
introduction_en: Marill, the Water Mouse Pokémon. Its sensitive ears can detect distant sounds and the round rubbery tip on its tail can expand and contract, assisting Marill in the water.
introduction_vn: Marill, the Water Mouse Pokémon. Its sensitive ears can detect distant sounds and the round rubbery tip on its tail can expand and contract, assisting Marill in the water.
introduction_kr: 마릴, 물쥐 포켓몬, 큰 귀로 먼 곳의 소리도 들을 수 있다. 늘었다 줄었다 하는 꼬리는 부낭처럼 사용하며, 물에서도 헤엄칠 수 있다.
introduction_pt: Marill, o Pokémon Water Mouse. Seus ouvidos sensíveis podem detectar sons distantes e a ponta redonda e emborrachada em sua cauda pode expandir e contrair, auxiliando Marill na água.
introduction_th: มาริล โปเกมอนหนูน้ำ หูที่ไวต่อเสียงสามารถรับรู้เสียงที่อยู่ไกลๆ ได้ และปลายหางที่กลมคล้ายยางสามารถขยายและหดตัวได้ ช่วยให้มาริลอยู่ในน้ำได้
location_pt: Bravo Matador de Dragões
location_th: นักล่ามังกรผู้กล้าหาญ

name: Azumarill
introduction: 玛力露丽，水兔子宝可梦，玛力露的进化形。拥有听力非常发达的耳朵，就算在激烈的水流中，也能清楚的听音辨位。
introduction_tw: 瑪力露麗，水兔子寶可夢，瑪力露的進化形。擁有聽力非常發達的耳朵，就算在激烈的水流中，也能清楚的聽音辨位。
introduction_en: Azumarill, the Aqua Rabbit Pokémon, and the evolved form of Marill. This Pokémon uses its large, highly developed ears to hear great distances, even wild, fast-moving rivers.
introduction_vn: Azumarill, the Aqua Rabbit Pokémon, and the evolved form of Marill. This Pokémon uses its large, highly developed ears to hear great distances, even wild, fast-moving rivers.
introduction_kr: 마릴리, 물토끼 포켓몬, 마릴의 진화형이다. 청력이 매우 발달한 귀는 세차게 흐르는 강 안에 무엇이 있는지도 분간할 수 있다.
introduction_pt: Azumarill, o Pokémon Aqua Rabbit, e a forma evoluída de Marill. Este Pokémon usa suas orelhas grandes e altamente desenvolvidas para ouvir grandes distâncias, até mesmo rios selvagens e velozes.
introduction_th: อาซูมาริล โปเกมอนกระต่ายน้ำ และมาริลที่วิวัฒนาการแล้ว โปเกมอนตัวนี้ใช้หูที่ใหญ่และได้รับการพัฒนามาอย่างดีเพื่อฟังเสียงในระยะไกล แม้แต่แม่น้ำที่เชี่ยวกรากและไหลเชี่ยว
location_pt: Bravo Matador de Dragões
location_th: นักล่ามังกรผู้กล้าหาญ

name: Misdreavus
introduction: 梦妖，尖叫宝可梦。喜欢恶作剧，会在夜里尖叫惊吓所有人。
introduction_tw: 夢妖，尖叫寶可夢。喜歡惡作劇，會在夜裡尖叫驚嚇所有人。
introduction_en: Misdreavus, the Screech Pokémon. Misdreavus are extremely mischievous and like to cry out at night just to startle people.
introduction_vn: Misdreavus, the Screech Pokémon. Misdreavus are extremely mischievous and like to cry out at night just to startle people.
introduction_kr: 무우마, 야명 포켓몬, 장난을 치는 것을 좋아하며, 밤중에 사람들을 놀라게 만들곤 한다.
introduction_pt: Misdreavus, o Pokémon Screech. Misdreavus são extremamente travessos e gostam de gritar à noite só para assustar as pessoas.
introduction_th: มิสเดรวัส โปเกม่อนเสียงกรี๊ด มิสเดรวัสเป็นโปเกม่อนที่ซุกซนมากและชอบส่งเสียงร้องในเวลากลางคืนเพื่อทำให้ผู้คนตกใจ

name: Mismagius
name_th: มิสมาจิอุส
introduction: 生活在宝可梦世界的不可思议的生物

name: Gligar
introduction: 天蝎，飞蝎宝可梦，利用手脚的薄膜乘着风，由上空发动攻击，会瞄准猎物的脸部。
introduction_tw: 天蠍，飛蠍寶可夢，利用手腳的薄膜乘著風，由上空發動攻擊，會瞄準獵物的臉部。
introduction_en: Gligar, the FlyScorpio Pokémon. It glides using the membrane attached to its arms and legs, and attacks the face of its prey with its claws.
introduction_vn: Gligar, the FlyScorpio Pokémon. It glides using the membrane attached to its arms and legs, and attacks the face of its prey with its claws.
introduction_kr: 글라이거, 날전갈 포켓몬, 손과 발의 막으로 바람을 타고 하늘에서 덮치는 전법을 쓴다. 먹이의 얼굴을 노린다.
introduction_pt: Gligar, o Pokémon FlyScorpio. Ele plana usando a membrana presa aos seus braços e pernas, e ataca o rosto de sua presa com suas garras.
introduction_th: กลิการ์ โปเกมอนฟลายสกอร์ปิโอ มันเคลื่อนที่โดยใช้เยื่อที่ติดอยู่ที่แขนและขา และโจมตีใบหน้าของเหยื่อด้วยกรงเล็บ
location_pt: Nerf Interfere
location_th: เนิร์ฟแทรกแซง

name: Gliscor
introduction: 可以不发出振翅声而在空中飞行。用长长的尾巴捕捉猎物，再用牙齿一击刺中要害。
introduction_tw: 可以不發出振翅聲而在空中飛行。用長長的尾巴捕捉獵物，再用牙齒一擊刺中要害。
introduction_en: They have the ability to fly without making the sound of their wings flapping. They can catch prey with their long tails and use their teeth at the right spot for a defeating bite.
introduction_vn: They have the ability to fly without making the sound of their wings flapping. They can catch prey with their long tails and use their teeth at the right spot for a defeating bite.
introduction_kr: 날개를 퍼덕이지 않고도 하늘을 날 수 있다.긴 꼬리로 사냥감을 낚아채고, 이빨로 허를 찔렀다.
introduction_pt: Eles têm a habilidade de voar sem fazer o som de suas asas batendo. Eles podem capturar presas com suas longas caudas e usar seus dentes no ponto certo para uma mordida derrotista.
introduction_th: พวกมันสามารถบินได้โดยไม่ส่งเสียงกระพือปีก พวกมันจับเหยื่อด้วยหางที่ยาว และใช้ฟันในจุดที่เหมาะสมเพื่อกัดเหยื่อ
location_pt: Nerf Interfere
location_th: เนิร์ฟแทรกแซง

name: Heracross
introduction: 赫拉克罗斯，独角宝可梦。个性温和，力气大。擅长让角钻进敌人的下腹，然后把敌人挑起来。喜欢的食物是树木流出来的甜树汁。
introduction_tw: 赫拉克羅斯，獨角寶可夢。個性溫和，力氣大。擅長讓角鑽進敵人的下腹，然後把敵人挑起來。喜歡的食物是樹木流出來的甜樹汁。
introduction_en: Heracross, the Single Horn Pokémon. Though gentle and docile, Heracross possesses great strength and power It's good at thrusting its prized horn under its enemies' bellies then lifts and throwing them. Their favorite food is the fresh sap of leafy trees.
introduction_vn: Heracross, the Single Horn Pokémon. Though gentle and docile, Heracross possesses great strength and power It's good at thrusting its prized horn under its enemies' bellies then lifts and throwing them. Their favorite food is the fresh sap of leafy trees.
introduction_kr: 헤라크로스, 외뿔 포켓몬, 온순한 성격이지만 힘이 무척 강하며, 뿔로 적의 배를 뚫고 들어올릴 수 있다. 나무에서 나오는 즙을 좋아한다.
introduction_pt: Heracross, o Pokémon de Chifre Único. Embora gentil e dócil, Heracross possui grande força e poder. Ele é bom em enfiar seu chifre premiado sob a barriga de seus inimigos, depois levanta e joga-os. Sua comida favorita é a seiva fresca de árvores frondosas.
introduction_th: เฮราครอส โปเกมอนฮอร์นเดี่ยว แม้จะอ่อนโยนและเชื่อง แต่เฮราครอสก็มีพละกำลังและความแข็งแกร่งมหาศาล มันเก่งในการแทงเขาอันล้ำค่าไว้ใต้ท้องของศัตรูแล้วยกและโยนพวกมันออกไป อาหารโปรดของพวกมันคือน้ำยางสดจากต้นไม้ที่มีใบเขียว

name: Celebi
introduction: 从未来穿越时光而来的宝可梦，凡是时拉比到过的地方，树木茂盛，繁花盛开，因此也被称为森林守护神。一般认为只要时拉比出现，就会有光明的未来在等着我们
introduction_tw: 從未來穿越時光而來的寶可夢，凡是時拉比到過的地方，樹木茂盛，繁花盛開，因此也被稱為森林守護神。一般認為只要時拉比出現，就會有光明的未來在等著我們
introduction_en: This Pokémon wanders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.
introduction_vn: This Pokémon wanders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.
introduction_kr: 시간을 넘어 여기저기를 방황한다. 세레비가 모습을 나타낸 숲은 초목이 무성해진다고 한다.

introduction_th: โปเกมอนตัวนี้เดินทางข้ามกาลเวลา หญ้าและต้นไม้เติบโตอย่างงดงามในป่าที่มันปรากฏตัว

name: Treecko

introduction_tw: 能夠用腳底的小刺鉤住垂直的牆壁攀爬。會甩動粗粗的尾巴進行摔打。

introduction_tw: 體內長出的葉子非常鋒利。會用敏捷的動作在樹枝間跳來跳去，從敵人的頭上或背後猛撲過去。

name: Mudkip

introduction_tw: 頭上的鰭是非常靈敏的雷達。可以不靠眼睛，從水或空氣的流動中探測周圍的情況。
introduction_en: The fin on its head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this Pokémon can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.
introduction_vn: The fin on its head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this Pokémon can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.
introduction_kr: 머리의 지느러미는 매우 민감한 레이더다. 눈을 통하지 않고도 물이나 공기의 흐름에서 주변의 상황을 탐지할 수 있다.
introduction_pt: A barbatana em sua cabeça age como um radar altamente sensível. Usando essa barbatana para sentir movimentos de água e ar, esse Pokémon pode determinar o que está acontecendo ao seu redor sem usar seus olhos.

name: Marshtomp

introduction_tw: 為了能在地面上也可以生存，它的身體表面覆蓋著一層薄薄的粘膜。會在退潮後的海岸邊玩泥巴。
introduction_en: The surface of Marshtomp’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This Pokémon plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.
introduction_vn: The surface of Marshtomp’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This Pokémon plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.

introduction_pt: A superfície do corpo de Marshtomp é envolvida por uma película fina e pegajosa que lhe permite viver em terra. Este Pokémon brinca na lama das praias quando a maré do oceano está baixa.
introduction_th: พื้นผิวร่างกายของ Marshtomp ถูกห่อหุ้มด้วยฟิล์มบางๆ เหนียวๆ ซึ่งช่วยให้มันอาศัยอยู่บนบกได้ โปเกมอนตัวนี้เล่นโคลนบนชายหาดเมื่อระดับน้ำทะเลลดลง

introduction_tw: 該寶可夢有著能輕鬆拖動１噸以上岩石塊的力量。視力很好，在渾濁的水中也能看清。

introduction_vn: It is able to easily drag large stone weighing over one ton. It is also able to see through cloudy waters and detect approaching storms with its fin.

name: Mega Swampert

introduction: 巨沼怪能通过用鳍感知波涛声和海风的细微变化来预测暴风雨。发生暴风雨时，会堆积岩石保护巢穴。
introduction_tw: 巨沼怪能通過用鰭感知波濤聲和海風的細微變化來預測暴風雨。發生暴風雨時，會堆積岩石保護巢穴。
introduction_en: Swampert predicts storms by sensing subtle differences in the sounds of waves and tidal winds with its fins. If a storm is approaching, it piles up boulders to protect itself.
introduction_vn: Swampert predicts storms by sensing subtle differences in the sounds of waves and tidal winds with its fins. If a storm is approaching, it piles up boulders to protect itself.

introduction_pt: Swampert prevê tempestades sentindo diferenças sutis nos sons das ondas e ventos de maré com suas nadadeiras. Se uma tempestade estiver se aproximando, ele empilha pedras para se proteger.
introduction_th: สแวมเพิร์ตทำนายพายุโดยรับรู้ความแตกต่างที่ละเอียดอ่อนในเสียงของคลื่นและลมแรงที่พัดผ่านครีบของมัน หากพายุเข้าใกล้ มันจะกองหินเพื่อป้องกันตัวเอง

name: Lotad
introduction: 浮在池塘或湖泊的水面上生活。虽然叶子枯萎了就会变弱，但为了寻找清水，偶尔也会在陆地上移动。
introduction_tw: 浮在池塘或湖泊的水面上生活。雖然葉子枯萎了就會變弱，但為了尋找清水，偶爾也會在陸地上移動。
introduction_en: Lotad live in ponds and lakes, where they float on the surface. It grows weak if its broad leaf dies. On rare occasions, this Pokémon travels on land in search of clean water.
introduction_vn: Lotad live in ponds and lakes, where they float on the surface. It grows weak if its broad leaf dies. On rare occasions, this Pokémon travels on land in search of clean water.
introduction_kr: 연못이나 호수의 수면에 떠서 산다. 잎사귀가 마르면 약해지지만, 깨끗한 물을 찾기 위해 가끔은 육지로 이동한다.
introduction_pt: Lotad vive em lagoas e lagos, onde flutua na superfície. Ele fica fraco se sua folha larga morre. Em raras ocasiões, este Pokémon viaja em terra em busca de água limpa.
introduction_th: โลแทดอาศัยอยู่ในบ่อน้ำและทะเลสาบ โดยจะลอยอยู่บนผิวน้ำ หากใบกว้างของมันตายลง ใบจะอ่อนแอลง ในบางครั้ง โปเกม่อนตัวนี้จะเดินทางบนบกเพื่อค้นหาน้ำสะอาด
location_pt: Cura em área
location_th: การรักษาแบบ AOE

name: Lombre
introduction: 夜行性，太阳下山后就会开始活动。如果看到垂钓者，就会从水中扯线捣乱并引以为乐。
introduction_tw: 夜行性，太陽下山後就會開始活動。如果看到垂釣者，就會從水中扯線搗亂並引以為樂。
introduction_en: Nocturnal - it will get active after dusk. It is also a mischief-maker. When this Pokémon spots anglers, it tugs on their fishing lines from beneath the surface and enjoys their consternation.
introduction_vn: Nocturnal - it will get active after dusk. It is also a mischief-maker. When this Pokémon spots anglers, it tugs on their fishing lines from beneath the surface and enjoys their consternation.

introduction_th: โปเกมอนที่สวมชุดเกราะเหล็ก ชุดเกราะชุดใหม่จะถูกสร้างขึ้นเมื่อมันวิวัฒนาการขึ้น ชุดเกราะเก่าที่ถูกทิ้งจะถูกนำกลับมาใช้ทำผลิตภัณฑ์เหล็ก

name: Lairon
introduction: 当两只可多拉相遇时会彼此碰撞钢铁的身体来争夺地盘。互相碰撞时的声音可传到几公里远。
introduction_tw: 當兩隻可朵拉相遇時會彼此碰撞鋼鐵的身體來爭奪地盤。互相碰撞時的聲音可傳到幾公里遠。
introduction_en: When two Lairon meet in the wild, they fight for territory by bashing into each other with their steel bodies. The sound of their collision carries for miles.
introduction_vn: When two Lairon meet in the wild, they fight for territory by bashing into each other with their steel bodies. The sound of their collision carries for miles.
introduction_kr: 갱도라 두 마리가 서로 만나면 강철의 몸을 부딪혀서 영역 다툼을 벌인다. 서로 부딪힐 때의 소리는 수 km 밖에서도 들린다.
introduction_pt: Quando dois Lairon se encontram na natureza, eles lutam por território batendo um no outro com seus corpos de aço. O som da colisão deles é ouvido por quilômetros.
introduction_th: เมื่อไลรอนสองตัวพบกันในป่า พวกมันจะต่อสู้แย่งชิงอาณาเขตด้วยการกระแทกกันด้วยร่างเหล็ก เสียงการปะทะกันของพวกมันดังไปไกลหลายไมล์

name: Aggron
introduction: 由于头上铁制的角会一点一点变长，因此从角的长度可以得知波士可多拉的年龄。铠甲上的伤痕可说是它战斗的奖牌。
introduction_tw: 由於頭上鐵制的角會一點一點變長，因此從角的長度可以得知波士可朵拉的年齡。鎧甲上的傷痕可說是它戰鬥的獎牌。
introduction_en: Its iron horns grow longer a little at a time. They are used to determine the Aggron's age. The gouges in its armor are worn with pride as mementos from battles.
introduction_vn: Its iron horns grow longer a little at a time. They are used to determine the Aggron's age. The gouges in its armor are worn with pride as mementos from battles.
introduction_kr: 머리 위 강철의 뿔이 점차 길어지기 때문에, 뿔의 길이로 보스로라의 나이를 알 수 있다. 갑옷의 상처는 싸움의 훈장이다.
introduction_pt: Seus chifres de ferro crescem um pouco mais. Eles são usados para determinar a idade do Aggron. As ranhuras em sua armadura são usadas com orgulho como lembranças de batalhas.
introduction_th: เขาเหล็กของมันจะยาวขึ้นทีละน้อย ใช้เพื่อระบุอายุของ Aggron รอยหยักบนเกราะของมันจะถูกสวมใส่ด้วยความภาคภูมิใจเพื่อเป็นของที่ระลึกจากการต่อสู้

name: Mega Aggron
name_th: เมก้า อักกรอน
introduction: 当山体因滑坡或山火而变得荒芜起来时，它就会不断地运土、种上树苗，将自己的领地打扫得漂漂亮亮的。
introduction_tw: 當山體因滑坡或山火而變得荒蕪起來時，它就會不斷地運土、種上樹苗，將自己的領地打掃得漂漂亮亮的。
introduction_en: If its mountain is ravaged by a landslide or a fire, this Pokémon will haul topsoil to the area, plant trees, and beautifully restore its own territory.
introduction_vn: If its mountain is ravaged by a landslide or a fire, this Pokémon will haul topsoil to the area, plant trees, and beautifully restore its own territory.
introduction_kr: 산사태나 산불로 산이 황폐해지면, 열심히 흙을 나르고 나무 모종을 심어 자신의 영역을 깨끗이 청소한다.
introduction_pt: Se sua montanha for devastada por um deslizamento de terra ou um incêndio, este Pokémon transportará solo superficial para a área, plantará árvores e restaurará lindamente seu próprio território.
introduction_th: หากภูเขาของมันได้รับความเสียหายจากดินถล่มหรือไฟไหม้ โปเกมอนตัวนี้จะขนหน้าดินมายังพื้นที่นั้น ปลูกต้นไม้ และฟื้นฟูอาณาเขตของมันให้สวยงาม

name: Numel
introduction: 在它背里积累着热滚滚的熔岩。拥有能搬运100公斤重货物的力量。长久以来一直在帮助人类工作。
introduction_tw: 在它背裡積累著熱滾滾的熔岩。擁有能搬運100公斤重貨物的力量。長久以來一直在幫助人類工作。
introduction_en: A Numel stores boiling magma in the hump on its back. It is a hardy Pokémon that can transport a 220-pound load. It has served humans at work since long ago.
introduction_vn: A Numel stores boiling magma in the hump on its back. It is a hardy Pokémon that can transport a 220-pound load. It has served humans at work since long ago.
introduction_kr: 등의 혹에는 뜨거운 용암이 담겨 있다. 100kg의 짐을 운반할 수 있으며, 오래 전부터 사람의 일을 도와주고 있다.
introduction_pt: Um Numel armazena magma fervente na corcova em suas costas. É um Pokémon resistente que pode transportar uma carga de 220 libras. Ele tem servido humanos no trabalho desde muito tempo atrás.
introduction_th: Numel กักเก็บแมกมาที่เดือดพล่านไว้บนหลังของมัน มันเป็นโปเกมอนที่แข็งแกร่งที่สามารถขนของหนักได้ถึง 220 ปอนด์ มันทำหน้าที่รับใช้มนุษย์ในการทำงานมาอย่างยาวนาน

name: Camerupt
introduction: 体内有着火山的宝可梦。时不时会从背上的驼峰里喷出体内储存的１万摄氏度的熔岩。
introduction_tw: 體內有著火山的寶可夢。時不時會從背上的駝峰裡噴出體內儲存的１萬攝氏度的熔岩。
introduction_en: They have volcanoes inside their bodies, which can erupt and spew lava of 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit from the humps at times.
introduction_vn: They have volcanoes inside their bodies, which can erupt and spew lava of 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit from the humps at times.
introduction_kr: 몸 안에 화산을 지닌 포켓몬, 몸 안에 모은 섭씨 1만 도의 용암을 등에 있는 혹에서 가끔씩 뿜어낸다.
introduction_pt: Eles têm vulcões dentro de seus corpos, que podem entrar em erupção e expelir lava de suas elevações a 18.000 graus Fahrenheit às vezes.
introduction_th: พวกมันมีภูเขาไฟอยู่ในร่างกาย ซึ่งสามารถปะทุและพ่นลาวาที่มีอุณหภูมิถึง 18,000 องศาฟาเรนไฮต์ออกมาจากสันเขาได้ในบางครั้ง

name: Spinda
introduction: 最大的特征是每一只身上的斑点花纹都不同。摇摇晃晃令人捉摸不定的脚步，具有让敌人不容易瞄准的效果。
introduction_tw: 最大的特徵是每一隻身上的斑點花紋都不同。搖搖晃晃令人捉摸不定的腳步，具有讓敵人不容易瞄準的效果。
introduction_en: It is distinguished by a pattern of spots that is always different. Its unsteady, tottering walk has the effect of fouling its foe's aim.
introduction_vn: It is distinguished by a pattern of spots that is always different. Its unsteady, tottering walk has the effect of fouling its foe's aim.
introduction_kr: 개체마다 무늬가 서로 다른 것이 특징이다. 흔들흔들 불안한 걸음걸이는 상대방의 조준을 피하는 효과가 있다.
introduction_pt: Ele se distingue por um padrão de manchas que é sempre diferente. Seu andar instável e cambaleante tem o efeito de atrapalhar a mira do inimigo.
introduction_th: มันโดดเด่นด้วยลวดลายจุดที่แตกต่างกันอยู่เสมอ การเดินเซไปมาทำให้เป้าหมายของศัตรูเสียไป
location_pt: Só brincando
location_th: แค่เล่น

name: Feebas
introduction: 栖息在有许多水草的水池里面。由于外形长得实在太丑，因此会培养它的训练家似乎很少。
introduction_tw: 棲息在有許多水草的水池裡面。由於外形長得實在太醜，因此會培養它的訓練家似乎很少。
introduction_en: Feebas live in ponds that are heavily infested with weeds. Because of its hopelessly shabby appearance, it seems as if few Trainers raise it.
introduction_vn: Feebas live in ponds that are heavily infested with weeds. Because of its hopelessly shabby appearance, it seems as if few Trainers raise it.
introduction_kr: 수초가 많은 연못에 서식한다. 생김새가 너무 못생긴 탓에 기르는 트레이너가 적은 것 같다.
introduction_pt: Feebas vivem em lagoas que são fortemente infestadas de ervas daninhas. Por causa de sua aparência irremediavelmente surrada, parece que poucos treinadores a criam.
introduction_th: ปลาฟีบาสอาศัยอยู่ในบ่อน้ำที่เต็มไปด้วยวัชพืช เนื่องจากปลาชนิดนี้มีรูปร่างทรุดโทรมจนดูไม่น่ามอง จึงดูเหมือนว่าจะมีคนฝึกเพียงไม่กี่คนเท่านั้นที่เลี้ยงปลาชนิดนี้
location_pt: Também esperando ser amado
location_th: ก็หวังที่จะได้รับความรักเช่นกัน

name: Milotic
introduction: 据说它生活在广大的湖边。被人称为最美丽的宝可梦，也被当作绘画与雕刻的对象。
introduction_tw: 據說它生活在廣大的湖邊。被人稱為最美麗的寶可夢，也被當作繪畫與雕刻的物件。
introduction_en: It is said to live at the bottom of large lakes. Considered to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon, it has been depicted in paintings and statues.
introduction_vn: It is said to live at the bottom of large lakes. Considered to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon, it has been depicted in paintings and statues.
introduction_kr: 거대한 호수 속에 있다고 한다. 가장 아름다운 포켓몬이라고 불리며, 회화나 조각의 모델이 되고 있다.
introduction_pt: Dizem que vive no fundo de grandes lagos. Considerado o mais belo de todos os Pokémon, ele foi retratado em pinturas e estátuas.
introduction_th: เชื่อกันว่าอาศัยอยู่ใต้ทะเลสาบขนาดใหญ่ ถือเป็นโปเกมอนที่สวยงามที่สุด โดยได้รับการวาดและปั้นเป็นภาพ
location_pt: Elegante e charmoso e acalma o ressentimento
location_th: สง่างามและมีเสน่ห์ และบรรเทาความเคียดแค้น

name: Shuppet
introduction: 会被嫉妒怨恨的感情所吸引。如果有人怨恨心变强，怨影娃娃就会成排地挂在那人的屋檐下。
introduction_tw: 會被嫉妒怨恨的感情所吸引。如果有人怨恨心變強，怨影娃娃就會成排地掛在那人的屋簷下。
introduction_en: It is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this Pokémon will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that person's home.
introduction_vn: It is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this Pokémon will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that person's home.
introduction_kr: 질투와 원한의 감정에 이끌린다. 누군가가 강한 원망의 마음을 품으면 어둠대신이 그 집의 처마 밑에 줄을 선다.
introduction_pt: Ele é atraído por sentimentos de ciúme e vingança. Se alguém desenvolver fortes sentimentos de vingança, este Pokémon aparecerá em um enxame e se alinhará sob os beirados da casa dessa pessoa.
introduction_th: โปเกมอนตัวนี้ถูกดึงดูดด้วยความรู้สึกอิจฉาริษยาและความอาฆาตแค้น หากใครมีความรู้สึกอาฆาตแค้นอย่างรุนแรง โปเกมอนตัวนี้จะปรากฏเป็นฝูงและเรียงแถวใต้ชายคาบ้านของบุคคลนั้น
location_pt: Corpo Amaldiçoado e Controle de Vingança
location_th: ร่างกายต้องคำสาปและการควบคุมการแก้แค้น

name: Banette
introduction: 用针刺伤自己的身体时，就会产生强烈的诅咒能量。原本是个被丢弃的可怜玩偶。
introduction_tw: 用針刺傷自己的身體時，就會產生強烈的詛咒能量。原本是個被丟棄的可憐玩偶。
introduction_en: It generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This Pokémon was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.
introduction_vn: It generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This Pokémon was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.
introduction_kr: 자신의 몸을 바늘로 찌를 때 강한 저주 에너지가 발생한다. 원래는 버려진 불쌍한 인형이다.
introduction_pt: Ele gera energia para lançar maldições fortes ao enfiar pinos em seu próprio corpo. Este Pokémon era originalmente uma boneca de pelúcia lamentável que foi jogada fora.
introduction_th: มันสร้างพลังงานเพื่อสาปแช่งอันรุนแรงโดยการปักหมุดลงบนร่างกายของมันเอง โปเกมอนตัวนี้เดิมทีเป็นตุ๊กตาผ้าขนนุ่มน่าสมเพชที่ถูกโยนทิ้งไป
location_pt: Corpo Amaldiçoado e Controle de Vingança
location_th: ร่างกายต้องคำสาปและการควบคุมการแก้แค้น

name: Mega Banette
name_th: เมก้าจูเป็ตตะ
introduction: 因为超级进化，怨念增强。拉链里面收纳着的诅咒之力满溢出来。

name: Duskull
introduction: 无论多厚的墙壁都能穿过。一旦被盯上，就会一直被追着，直到第二天早上太阳升起。
introduction_tw: 無論多厚的牆壁都能穿過。一旦被盯上，就會一直被追著，直到第二天早上太陽升起。
introduction_en: Duskull can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this Pokémon chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn.
introduction_vn: Duskull can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this Pokémon chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn.
introduction_kr: 아무리 두꺼운 벽이라도 통과한다. 한 번 노려지면 아침 해가 뜰 때까지 계속 쫓겨 다니게 된다.
introduction_pt: Duskull pode atravessar qualquer parede, não importa quão grossa ela seja. Uma vez que este Pokémon escolhe um alvo, ele persegue obstinadamente a vítima pretendida até o amanhecer.
introduction_th: Duskull สามารถทะลุผ่านกำแพงใดๆ ก็ได้ ไม่ว่ากำแพงนั้นจะหนาเพียงใดก็ตาม เมื่อโปเกมอนตัวนี้เลือกเป้าหมายได้แล้ว มันจะไล่ตามเหยื่อที่ตั้งใจไว้จนถึงรุ่งสาง
location_pt: Controle de buraco negro
location_th: การควบคุมหลุมดำ

name: Dusclops
introduction: 身体内部是空洞，什么都没有。据说会像黑洞般，无论什么都吸进去，一旦被吸进去就回不来了。
introduction_tw: 身體內部是空洞，什麼都沒有。據說會像黑洞般，無論什麼都吸進去，一旦被吸進去就回不來了。
introduction_en: Dusclops's body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This Pokémon will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out.
introduction_vn: Dusclops's body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This Pokémon will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out.
introduction_kr: 몸 안에는 텅 비어서 아무것도 없다. 블랙홀처럼 무엇이든 빨아들이며, 빨려 들어가면 되돌아 올 수 없다고 한다.
introduction_pt: O corpo de Dusclops é completamente oco - não há nada dentro. Dizem que seu corpo é como um buraco negro. Este Pokémon absorverá qualquer coisa em seu corpo, mas nada jamais retornará.
introduction_th: ร่างกายของ Dusclops เป็นโพรงกลวงทั้งหมด ไม่มีอะไรเลยภายในร่างกาย ว่ากันว่าร่างกายของมันเหมือนหลุมดำ โปเกมอนตัวนี้จะดูดซับทุกอย่างเข้าไปในร่างกาย แต่ไม่มีอะไรกลับออกมาได้อีก
location_pt: Controle de buraco negro
location_th: การควบคุมหลุมดำ

name: Dusknoir
name_th: ดัสก์นัวร์
introduction: 用头部的天线接收来自灵界的电波。接收指示后将人带往灵界。
